① 二项P(Y=5)反解s+t\(\binom{5}{5}(s+t)^5=c\Rightarrow s+t=c^{1/5}\)L17
② 代入线性约束\(1.75s+t=1,\ s=c^{1/5}-t\)∫ 微积分
③ 整理解t\(0.75t=1.75c^{1/5}-1\Rightarrow t=\dfrac{7c^{1/5}-4}{3}\)∫ 微积分
407命名分布 ⭐ 主推L20
The lifetime of a new electronic device is exponentially distributed with a median of three years. Calculate the variance of the remaining lifetime, given the device did not fail before 0.5 years.
一台新电子设备的寿命服从中位数为三年的指数分布。已知该设备在 0.5 年之前未发生故障,计算其剩余寿命的方差。
(A) 3.8(B) 4.3(C) 9.0(D) 14.7(E) 18.7
无记忆余寿方差
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 中位数=3解均值β\(0.5=e^{-3/\beta}\Rightarrow\beta=3/\ln 2=4.32809\)L09
② 指数方差为β²\(Var=\beta^2=18.73232\)L20
③ 无记忆性方差不变\(Var(\text{剩余寿命}\mid t=0.5)=\beta^2=18.73232\)L20
408条件与贝叶斯 📌 L04 ⭐ 主推L04
A purse contains two coins, one fair and one two-headed. One of the coins is selected at random and tossed twice. Both tosses result in heads. Calculate the probability that a third toss of the selected coin will result in heads.
一个钱包里有两枚硬币,一枚是公平硬币,另一枚是两面都是正面的硬币。随机选出其中一枚硬币并抛掷两次,两次都得到正面。计算所选硬币第三次抛掷得到正面的概率。
(A) 1/2(B) 9/16(C) 5/8(D) 4/5(E) 9/10
两币贝叶斯预测
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 嵌套事件条件概率\(P(HHH\mid HH)=\dfrac{P(HHH)}{P(HH)}\)L03
② 全概率算P(HH)\(\tfrac14\cdot\tfrac12+1\cdot\tfrac12=\tfrac58\)L04
③ 全概率算P(HHH)\(\tfrac18\cdot\tfrac12+1\cdot\tfrac12=\tfrac{9}{16}\)L04
④ 相除\(\dfrac{9/16}{5/8}=\dfrac{9}{10}\)∫ 微积分
409保险赔付 📌 L05 💎 唯一L05
The amount of a loss under a fire insurance policy is continuous and has cumulative distribution function \(F(x) = 0\) for \(x < 0\); \(c\left(\frac{x}{15}\right)^{4/3}\) for \(0 \le x \le 10\); \(1\) for \(x > 10\), where c is a positive constant. The insurer reimburses each loss up to a maximum amount m. The probability that a given loss is partially reimbursed is 0.56. Calculate m.
某火灾保险保单下的损失额是连续的,其累积分布函数为:当 \(x < 0\) 时 \(F(x) = 0\);当 \(0 \le x \le 10\) 时为 \(c\left(\frac{x}{15}\right)^{4/3}\);当 \(x > 10\) 时为 \(1\),其中 c 是一个正常数。保险公司对每笔损失赔付至多 m 的金额。某笔损失被部分赔付的概率为 0.56。计算 m。
(A) 5.40(B) 6.47(C) 7.03(D) 7.80(E) 8.10
CDF定c反解上限
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 损失上限10定常数c\(1=F(10)=c\left(\tfrac{10}{15}\right)^{4/3}\Rightarrow c=\left(\tfrac{15}{10}\right)^{4/3}\)L05
② 部分报销概率列尾方程\(0.56=P[X>m]=1-\left(\tfrac{m}{10}\right)^{4/3}\)L05
③ 解出m\(m=10(1-0.56)^{3/4}=5.40\)∫ 微积分
410离散联合 📌 L11 💎 唯一L11
This year, a homeowner experiences no tornadoes with probability 0.80, exactly one tornado with probability 0.12, exactly two tornadoes with probability 0.05, and exactly three tornadoes with probability 0.03. Each tornado independently results in a loss of 1 with probability 0.50 and a loss of 2 with probability 0.50. Let X be the number of tornadoes that the homeowner experiences this year, and Y be the total amount of losses that the homeowner experiences this year due to all the tornadoes. Let \(F(x, y)\) be the joint cumulative distribution function of X and Y. Calculate \(F(2,3)\).
今年,某房主经历零次龙卷风的概率为 0.80,恰好一次龙卷风的概率为 0.12,恰好两次龙卷风的概率为 0.05,恰好三次龙卷风的概率为 0.03。每次龙卷风相互独立地以概率 0.50 造成金额为 1 的损失,以概率 0.50 造成金额为 2 的损失。设 X 为该房主今年经历的龙卷风次数,Y 为该房主今年因所有龙卷风遭受的损失总额。设 \(F(x, y)\) 为 X 和 Y 的联合累积分布函数。计算 \(F(2,3)\)。
(A) 0.0250(B) 0.0500(C) 0.0675(D) 0.9325(E) 0.9575
离散联合CDF求值
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 联合CDF定义拆事件\(F_{X,Y}(2,3)=P[X\le 2\ \text{且}\ Y\le 3]\)L11
② 按龙卷风数分情形\(X\le 1:\ p=0.8+0.12=0.92,\ \text{损失必}\le 2\)L04
③ X=2时限制两损非全2\(1-(0.5)^2=0.75\)L11
④ 加权汇总\(0.92+0.05(0.75)=0.9575\)∫ 微积分
411离散联合 ≒ Q471L11 · L08
An automobile insurance company specializes in insuring high-risk drivers. The number of accidents for a randomly selected high-risk driver in year 1 is modeled by a random variable X. The number of accidents for the same driver in year 2 is modeled by a random variable Y. The probability mass function of X and Y is \(p(x,y) = \frac{(4-x)(3-y)}{60}\) for \(x = 0, 1, 2, 3\) and \(y = 0, 1, 2\), and 0 otherwise. Calculate Var(Y).
某汽车保险公司专门为高风险驾驶人承保。随机选取的一名高风险驾驶人在第 1 年的事故次数用随机变量 X 建模。同一名驾驶人在第 2 年的事故次数用随机变量 Y 建模。X 与 Y 的联合概率质量函数为:当 \(x = 0, 1, 2, 3\) 且 \(y = 0, 1, 2\) 时 \(p(x,y) = \frac{(4-x)(3-y)}{60}\),其他情形为 0。计算 Var(Y)。
(A) 0.56(B) 0.67(C) 0.75(D) 1.00(E) 1.44
联合pmf求VarY
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 按行求Y边缘pmf\(p_Y(0)=\tfrac{30}{60},\ p_Y(1)=\tfrac{20}{60},\ p_Y(2)=\tfrac{10}{60}\)L11
② 算一阶二阶矩\(E(Y)=\tfrac{4}{6},\ E(Y^2)=\tfrac{2}{6}+\tfrac{4}{6}=1\)L08
③ 方差公式\(Var(Y)=1-\left(\tfrac46\right)^2=\tfrac{20}{36}=0.56\)L08
412次序统计量 📌 L23 ⭐ 主推L23 · L15
Claims on a liability policy are independent and uniformly distributed on the interval [0, 10]. An auditor randomly selects three claims. Calculate the probability that the maximum of the three claims is less than 7.
某责任保险保单的索赔相互独立,且在区间 [0, 10] 上服从均匀分布。一位审计员随机选取三笔索赔。计算这三笔索赔的最大值小于 7 的概率。
(A) 0.027(B) 0.081(C) 0.189(D) 0.343(E) 0.441
三均匀最大值
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 最大值事件化为交集\(P(\max<7)=P(\text{三笔皆}<7)=P(X<7)^3\)L23
② 单笔概率\(P(X<7)=0.7\)L05
③ 独立取立方\((0.7)^3=0.343\)∫ 微积分
413数字特征 💎 唯一L07 · L18
An auditor is examining insurance policies for fraud. A policyholder can only file one claim. The probability of any given policy having a claim is 0.90, and the probability of a claim being fraudulent is 0.20. The auditor picks five policies at random and examines them in order until he finds two fraudulent claims. He then stops examining policies. If he doesn't find two fraudulent claims, he stops after examining the fifth policy. Calculate the expected number of policies he will examine.
一名审计员正在检查保单是否存在欺诈。每位保单持有人只能提出一笔索赔。任一给定保单存在索赔的概率为 0.90,而一笔索赔属于欺诈的概率为 0.20。审计员随机抽取五份保单,并按顺序逐一检查,直到发现两笔欺诈性索赔为止。此后他便停止检查保单。若他未能发现两笔欺诈性索赔,则在检查完第五份保单后停止。计算他预期将检查的保单数量。
(A) 4.68(B) 4.73(C) 4.78(D) 4.83(E) 4.88
截断检查数期望
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 乘法法则合成成功率\(p=0.9(0.2)=0.18\)L03
② 负二项pmf列前几项\(p(2)=0.18^2,\ p(3)=2(0.82)(0.18)^2,\ p(4)=3(0.82)^2(0.18)^2\)L18
③ 截断在5归集余概率\(p(5)=1-0.0324-0.0531-0.0654=0.8491\)L01
④ 离散期望\(E(X)=2(0.0324)+3(0.0531)+4(0.0654)+5(0.8491)=4.7312\)L07
414组合计数 ≒ Q376L02
An agent markets a new life insurance policy to nine people. Six of the nine have already purchased an insurance product from the agent. The agent randomly selects four of the nine people for appointments today. Calculate the probability that at least three of the four people with appointments have already purchased an insurance product from the agent.
一名代理人向九个人推销一款新的人寿保险保单。这九人中有六人此前已从该代理人处购买过保险产品。该代理人从九人中随机选取四人作今日约见。计算获约见的四人中至少有三人此前已从该代理人处购买过保险产品的概率。
(A) 0.10(B) 0.12(C) 0.14(D) 0.48(E) 0.60
超几何至少三
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 识别超几何求两情形\(P[X=3]+P[X=4]\)L02
② 组合计数\(\dfrac{\binom{6}{3}\binom{3}{1}}{\binom{9}{4}}+\dfrac{\binom{6}{4}\binom{3}{0}}{\binom{9}{4}}\)L02
③ 求和\(0.4762+0.1190=0.5952\)∫ 微积分
415数字特征 💎 唯一L07
A specialty store sells only baby carriages and car seats. The price of a baby carriage is 300 and the price of a car seat is 100. The proprietor knows that 60% of the people stopping at the store do not make a purchase, 20% buy a baby carriage, and 35% buy a car seat. No customer buys more than one of each item. If a customer buys both a baby carriage and a car seat, the proprietor gives a 10% discount on the total. Calculate the revenue the proprietor expects on a day that 200 people come to the store.
某专营店只销售婴儿手推车和汽车安全座椅。一辆婴儿手推车的价格为 300,一个汽车安全座椅的价格为 100。店主知道,在到店的人中,60% 不购买任何物品,20% 购买婴儿手推车,35% 购买汽车安全座椅。任何顾客对每种物品都不会购买超过一件。若某顾客同时购买一辆婴儿手推车和一个汽车安全座椅,店主对总额给予 10% 的折扣。计算在有 200 人到店的一天里店主预期获得的营业收入。
(A) 8,200(B) 17,800(C) 18,400(D) 18,440(E) 29,800
折扣期望收入
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 设三区变量列方程组\(C+S+B+120=200,\ C+B=40,\ S+B=70\)L01
② 容斥消元解各区人数\(40+70-B+120=200\Rightarrow B=30,\ C=10,\ S=40\)L01
③ 按单价算总收入\(10(300)+40(100)+30(360)=17800\)∫ 微积分
416线性组合与CLT 📌 L22 ⭐ 主推L22 · L19
A company has 1000 dental insurance policies. The number of claims filed by a policyholder during one year is a Poisson random variable with variance 1. The number of claims filed by these policyholders are mutually independent. The payment for each dental claim is 100 and the annual premium for each policy is 103% of the total expected claim payments for that policy. Calculate the probability, using the normal approximation, that the total claim payments on the 1000 policies exceeds the total premium collected.
某公司有 1000 份牙科保险保单。一位保单持有人一年内提出的索赔次数是方差为 1 的泊松随机变量。各保单持有人提出的索赔次数相互独立。每笔牙科索赔的赔付为 100,每份保单的年保费为该保单预期索赔赔付总额的 103%。利用正态近似,计算这 1000 份保单的索赔赔付总额超过所收保费总额的概率。
(A) 0.001(B) 0.159(C) 0.167(D) 0.488(E) 0.500
泊松总和正态近似
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 泊松单人均值=方差=1\(E(X_i)=Var(X_i)=1\)L19
② 总额线性缩放求均值方差\(E(S)=100000,\ Var(S)=100^2(1000)=10^7,\ \sigma_S=3162.28\)L08
③ CLT+连续性校正标准化\(P(S>103000)=P\left(Z>\dfrac{103050-100000}{3162.28}=0.9645\right)\)L22
④ 查表\(=0.167\)L21
📖 第②步思路:两层结构,各用各的定律——总赔付 \(S=100N\),其中 \(N=\sum_{i=1}^{1000}N_i\) 是总索赔件数:
① 里层(计数相加):iid Poisson(1) 之和,可加性 → \(N\sim\)Poisson(1000),\(E(N)=\mathrm{Var}(N)=1000\)(方差=均值,泊松招牌);② 外层(每件恒付 100):缩放律 \(E(S)=100E(N)=100{,}000\),\(\mathrm{Var}(S)=100^2\mathrm{Var}(N)=10^7\Rightarrow\sigma_S=3162.28\)——与 22.9 同款「E 提一次方、Var 提平方」。
📖 第③步思路:保费线、事件翻译、箱宽 100 的校正——单份保单保费 = 103% × 单份期望赔付 = \(1.03\times(1\times100)=103\),千份合计 103,000。关键细节:S 只取 100 的倍数(整件数 × 100),格点间距是 100,连续性校正的箱宽也是 100:\(S>103000\iff N>1030\iff N\ge1031\),N 尺度切口 1030.5,换回 S 尺度 \(\times100=\)103,050——这就是 103,050 的来历:半箱 = 50,不是 0.5。\(z=\frac{103050-100000}{3162.28}=0.9645\),\(P(Z>0.96)=0.167\) (C)。
⚠️ 两个易滑点:①保费是常数(收定了),随机的只有赔付端——别给 103,000 配方差;②校正加 0.5 而不是 50(忘了 S 的格点被 100 拉宽)→ \(z=0.9487\),粗选项抓不住但精算尺度上是错的——校正量永远是半个格点间距,先问变量走几步一格。
417命名分布 ≒ Q488L18
On average, a certain word processing software program has a fatal crash once in every 50 instances of saving a document. The instances of fatal crashes, while saving, are independent from one another. Calculate the probability that the second fatal crash, while saving, occurs on the fourth instance of saving a document.
平均而言,某文字处理软件程序每保存文档 50 次就会发生一次致命崩溃。保存过程中发生的各次致命崩溃彼此相互独立。计算保存文档过程中第二次致命崩溃恰好发生在第四次保存时的概率。
(A) 0.00038(B) 0.00115(C) 0.00230(D) 0.01882(E) 0.02000
负二项第二次成功
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 识别负二项:第2败于第4次\(r=2,\ k=4,\ p=0.02\)L18
② 前3次含1次+末次固定\(P=\binom{3}{1}(0.02)^2(0.98)^2\)L18
③ 求值\(=0.001152\)∫ 微积分
418条件与贝叶斯 📌 L03 ⭐ 主推L03 · L11
A policyholder purchases car insurance for two years. In a given year, the policyholder's number of car accidents is zero with probability 0.9, exactly one with probability 0.08, and exactly two with probability 0.02. The number of accidents in the first year is independent of the number in the second. Calculate the probability that the policyholder has one accident in each year, given that the policyholder has a total of exactly two accidents.
一位保单持有人购买了为期两年的汽车保险。在给定的某一年内,该保单持有人的汽车事故次数为零的概率为 0.9,恰好一次的概率为 0.08,恰好两次的概率为 0.02。第一年的事故次数与第二年的事故次数相互独立。已知该保单持有人两年共发生恰好两次事故,计算其每年各发生一次事故的概率。
(A) 0.006(B) 0.042(C) 0.151(D) 0.262(E) 0.960
总数给定条件概率
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 条件于和写成比值\(P(M=1,N=1\mid M+N=2)=\dfrac{P(M=1,N=1)}{P(M+N=2)}\)L03
② 独立枚举和为2的组合\(P(M+N=2)=0.9(0.02)+0.08(0.08)+0.02(0.9)=0.0424\)L11
③ 相除\(\dfrac{0.08(0.08)}{0.0424}=\dfrac{0.0064}{0.0424}=0.151\)∫ 微积分
419命名分布 💎 唯一L15 · L06
A customer purchases a lawnmower with a two-year warranty. The number of years before the lawnmower needs a repair is uniformly distributed on [0, 5]. Calculate the probability that the lawnmower needs no repairs within 4.5 years after the purchase, given that the lawnmower needs no repairs within the warranty period.
一位顾客购买了一台带有两年保修的割草机。割草机在需要维修前的使用年数在 [0, 5] 上均匀分布。已知割草机在保修期内无需任何维修,计算割草机自购买之日起 4.5 年内无需任何维修的概率。
(A) 0.10(B) 0.17(C) 0.44(D) 0.50(E) 0.60
均匀条件生存
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均匀分布写生存概率\(P(X>t)=\dfrac{5-t}{5},\ X\sim U[0,5]\)L15
② 嵌套事件条件概率\(P[X>4.5\mid X>2]=\dfrac{P[X>4.5]}{P[X>2]}\)L03
③ 长度比求值\(\dfrac{0.5/5}{3/5}=\dfrac{1}{6}=0.167\)∫ 微积分
420单变量基础 💎 唯一L05
A scientist estimates the time (in tens of millions of years) before a major asteroid will hit the earth using a random variable X with probability density function \( f(x) = xe^{-x} \) for \( x > 0 \), and \( f(x) = 0 \) otherwise. Calculate the probability that the next time the earth is hit by a major asteroid occurs between 10 million and 20 million years from now.
一位科学家用一个概率密度函数为 \( f(x) = xe^{-x} \)(当 \( x > 0 \) 时)、其余情形 \( f(x) = 0 \) 的随机变量 X 来估计一颗大型小行星撞击地球之前的时间(以千万年为单位)。计算下一次地球被大型小行星撞击发生在从现在起 1000 万年至 2000 万年之间的概率。
(A) 0.0005(B) 0.0867(C) 0.3298(D) 0.6702(E) 0.9995
gamma形密度积分
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 写出目标定积分\(\int_1^2 xe^{-x}\,dx\)L07
② 分部积分拆项\(=-xe^{-x}\big|_1^2+\int_1^2 e^{-x}dx\)∫ 微积分
③ 代上下限求值\(=-3e^{-2}+2e^{-1}=0.3298\)∫ 微积分
421命名分布 📌 L20 ⭐ 主推L20 · L09
The lifetimes of televisions of a certain model are exponentially distributed with a median of 2.7 years. Calculate the 87.5th percentile of the lifetimes for these televisions.
某型号电视机的寿命服从指数分布,中位数为 2.7 年。计算这些电视机寿命的第 87.5 百分位数。
(A) 3.08(B) 4.73(C) 8.10(D) 10.80(E) 19.68
指数分位由中位
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 中位数套指数CDF\(0.5=1-e^{-2.7/\beta}\)L09
② 解出均值参数\(2.7/\beta=0.6931\Rightarrow\beta=3.8953\)L20
③ 列87.5%分位方程\(0.875=1-e^{-p/3.8953}\)L09
④ 取对数解p\(p/3.8953=2.0794\Rightarrow p=8.10\)∫ 微积分
422组合计数 💎 唯一L01
Events A and B are mutually exclusive, and at least one of A or B is certain to occur. Events C and D are mutually exclusive, and at least one of C or D is certain to occur. The following probabilities are known: i) \( P[A] = 0.75 \) | ii) \( P[D] = 0.20 \) | iii) \( P[A \cap C] = 0.55 \). Calculate \( P[B \cap D] \).
事件 A 与 B 互斥,且 A 或 B 中至少有一个必然发生。事件 C 与 D 互斥,且 C 或 D 中至少有一个必然发生。已知下列概率:i) \( P[A] = 0.75 \) | ii) \( P[D] = 0.20 \) | iii) \( P[A \cap C] = 0.55 \)。计算 \( P[B \cap D] \)。
(A) 0.00(B) 0.05(C) 0.20(D) 0.25(E) 0.45
互斥补事件代数
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 用C,D互斥穷尽拆A\(P[A]=P[A\cap C]+P[A\cap D]\)L04
② 解出A∩D\(P[A\cap D]=0.75-0.50=0.20\)∫ 微积分
③ 再用A,B互斥穷尽拆D\(P[D]=P[A\cap D]+P[B\cap D]\)L04
④ 解出B∩D\(P[B\cap D]=0.20-0.20=0\)∫ 微积分
423条件与贝叶斯 ≒ Q11L03
A survey was conducted within the population of those who claim to have contributed to charity during the previous year. Results indicate that 70% of this population claimed to have contributed at least 1000, 50% overstated the value of their contributions, and 45% did both. Assume that the survey accurately represents the population. Calculate the probability that a randomly selected person overstated the value of his contribution, given that they claimed to have contributed less than 1000.
在自称去年曾向慈善机构捐款的人群中进行了一项调查。结果表明,该人群中 70% 自称捐款至少 1000,50% 高报了其捐款额,45% 两者兼有。假设该调查准确地代表了该人群。已知某人自称捐款不足 1000,计算随机选取的此人高报了其捐款额的概率。
(A) 1/20(B) 1/10(C) 1/6(D) 3/4(E) 5/6
容斥条件概率
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 补全2x2联表行和0.70、列和0.50定各格L01
② 求交叉格概率\(P[\text{夸大}\cap<1000]=0.50-0.45=0.05\)L01
③ 条件概率取比值\(P=0.05/0.30=1/6\)L03
424组合计数 💎 唯一L02
A website requires a five-character password consisting of exactly three distinct characters selected from the 26 upper-case letters of the alphabet and exactly two characters, not necessarily distinct, selected from the ten digits. The password must begin with one of the selected letters. Calculate the maximum number of unique passwords, in millions, the site will accommodate.
某网站要求设置一个由五个字符组成的密码,其中恰有三个互不相同的字符选自 26 个大写英文字母,恰有两个字符(不必互不相同)选自十个数字。密码必须以所选字母中的某一个开头。计算该网站所能容纳的唯一密码的最大数量(以百万计)。
(A) 3.120(B) 4.212(C) 4.680(D) 8.424(E) 9.360
密码组合计数
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 选3字母并定首位\(\binom{26}{3}\times 3=7800\)L02
② 排其余2字母\(_4P_2=12\)L02
③ 排2个数字\(10^2=100\)L02
④ 乘法原理合计\(7800\times12\times100=9{,}360{,}000\)L02
425命名分布 ≒ Q358L19 · L10
This year, the number of tooth fillings a policyholder undergoes is Poisson distributed. The probability that the policyholder undergoes no tooth fillings this year is 0.18. Calculate the mode of the number of tooth fillings the policyholder undergoes this year.
今年,某保单持有人接受补牙的次数服从泊松分布。该保单持有人今年不接受任何补牙的概率为 0.18。计算该保单持有人今年接受补牙次数的众数。
(A) 0(B) 1(C) 2(D) 5(E) 6
泊松众数由P0
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 零概率反解泊松均值\(0.18=e^{-\lambda}\Rightarrow\lambda=1.7147\)L19
② 非整数均值取下整为众数\(\text{mode}=\lfloor 1.7147\rfloor=1\)L10
426单变量基础 ⭐ 主推L06 · L05
The time, in years, until replacement for a new telephone pole has probability density function \( f(t) = kt \) for \( 0 < t < 50 \), and \( f(t) = 0 \) otherwise, where \( k \) is a constant. Calculate the probability that a new telephone pole will be replaced within 25 years given that it is not replaced within 20 years.
一根新电线杆直至更换为止的时间(以年计)具有概率密度函数:当 \( 0 < t < 50 \) 时 \( f(t) = kt \),其余情形 \( f(t) = 0 \),其中 \( k \) 是一个常数。已知一根新电线杆在 20 年内未被更换,计算它在 25 年内被更换的概率。
(A) 0.09(B) 0.11(C) 0.16(D) 0.17(E) 0.84
线性密度条件概率
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 密度归一求k\(1=\int_0^{50}kt\,dt\Rightarrow k=1/1250\)L05
② 条件概率化区间比\(P[T\le25\mid T\ge20]=\frac{P[20<T<25]}{P[T>20]}\)L03
③ 积分求比值\(=\frac{(625-400)/2500}{(2500-400)/2500}=225/2100=0.10714\)∫ 微积分
428命名分布 ≒ Q421L20
The working lifetime of a master computer chip that regulates the electronic components of an automobile engine is exponentially distributed with a mean of 7.2 years. Under a warranty, the chip manufacturer will replace any chip that fails within \( t \) years. It is expected that 5% of all chips will be replaced under this warranty. Calculate \( t \).
调节汽车发动机电子部件的主控计算机芯片的工作寿命服从均值为 7.2 年的指数分布。在保修条款下,芯片制造商将更换任何在 \( t \) 年内失效的芯片。预期所有芯片中将有 5% 依此保修被更换。计算 \( t \)。
(A) 0.007(B) 0.369(C) 0.416(D) 0.501(E) 0.720
指数保修反解t
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 寿命套指数CDF\(0.05=1-e^{-t/7.2}\)L20
② 视为5%分位求t\(e^{-t/7.2}=0.95\)L09
③ 取对数解出\(t=-7.2\ln 0.95=0.3693\)∫ 微积分
429数字特征 ≒ Q54L09
A baseball-pitching machine is used for batting practice. The machine is out of adjustment such that every pitched baseball arrives at the batter's box between 0 and 2 feet higher than intended. Let X equal the difference, in feet, between the actual arrival height and the intended arrival height of a pitched baseball. The density of X, \( f(x) \), is proportional to \( x \). Calculate the 80th percentile for X.
一台棒球投球机用于打击练习。该机器失调,以致每个投出的棒球到达击球区时都比预定高度高 0 至 2 英尺。设 X 等于一个投出的棒球实际到达高度与预定到达高度之差(以英尺计)。X 的密度函数 \( f(x) \) 与 \( x \) 成正比。计算 X 的第 80 百分位数。
(A) 0.40(B) 0.89(C) 1.26(D) 1.60(E) 1.79
线性密度80分位
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 密度归一求c\(1=\int_0^2 cx\,dx=2c\Rightarrow c=0.5\)L05
② 列80%分位方程\(0.8=\int_0^p 0.5x\,dx=0.25p^2\)L09
③ 开方解p\(p=\sqrt{3.2}=1.7889\)∫ 微积分
430命名分布 💎 唯一L20 · L08
Two different models of televisions, A and B, have exponentially distributed lifespans, measured in years. The probability that television A and television B are still working \( T \) years from now is 0.49 and 0.70, respectively. The variance of television A's lifespan is 5.60. Calculate the variance of television B's lifespan.
两种不同型号的电视机 A 和 B,其寿命(以年计)服从指数分布。电视机 A 和电视机 B 在从现在起 \( T \) 年后仍能工作的概率分别为 0.49 和 0.70。电视机 A 寿命的方差为 5.60。计算电视机 B 寿命的方差。
(A) 1.40(B) 1.80(C) 2.80(D) 11.20(E) 22.40
双指数方差比
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 方差反推X均值\(\lambda_1^2=5.6\Rightarrow\lambda_1=2.3664\)L20
② X生存概率解T\(0.49=e^{-T/2.3664}\Rightarrow T=1.6881\)L20
③ Y生存概率解均值\(0.7=e^{-1.6881/\lambda_2}\Rightarrow\lambda_2=4.7332\)L20
④ 指数方差=均值平方\(Var(Y)=4.7332^2=22.403\)L08
431线性组合与CLT ⭐ 主推L21
Each year, a car insurance company's four quarterly profits are mutually independent and normally distributed with common mean and variance. Each quarter, the probability that the company earns a positive profit is 0.80. Calculate the probability that the company earns an overall positive profit in a given year.
每年,某汽车保险公司的四个季度利润相互独立,且服从具有共同均值和方差的正态分布。每个季度,公司实现正利润的概率为 0.80。计算公司在给定的一年内实现整体正利润的概率。
(A) 0.410(B) 0.663(C) 0.800(D) 0.954(E) 0.998
四季正态和为正
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 单季盈利概率标准化\(0.8=P[Z>-\mu/\sigma]\Rightarrow\mu/\sigma=0.84\)L21
② 独立正态和的参数\(S\sim N(4\mu,4\sigma^2)\)L21
③ 标准化年盈利概率\(P[S>0]=P[Z>-2\mu/\sigma=-1.68]=0.9535\)L21
432命名分布 💎 唯一L21
A large life insurance company gets a steady inflow of new policyholders each month. In the past, the number of new policyholders per month, \( N_{\text{past}} \), was normally distributed with mean 500, standard deviation \( \sigma \), and \( P[N_{\text{past}} < 400] = 0.1056 \). The company has just undertaken a new marketing strategy, which is projected to have a positive effect on new sales. The projected number of new policyholders per month, \( N_{\text{future}} \), is normally distributed with mean 550 and standard deviation \( 1.25\sigma \). Calculate \( P[370 < N_{\text{future}} < 730] \).
一家大型人寿保险公司每月都有稳定的新保单持有人流入。过去,每月新增保单持有人数 \( N_{\text{past}} \) 服从均值为 500、标准差为 \( \sigma \) 的正态分布,且 \( P[N_{\text{past}} < 400] = 0.1056 \)。该公司刚刚实施了一项新的营销策略,预计将对新销售产生正面影响。预计每月新增保单持有人数 \( N_{\text{future}} \) 服从均值为 550、标准差为 \( 1.25\sigma \) 的正态分布。计算 \( P[370 < N_{\text{future}} < 730] \)。
(A) 0.903(B) 0.928(C) 0.970(D) 0.976(E) 0.985
正态缩放σ区间
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 由尾概率反解σ\(\frac{400-500}{\sigma}=-1.25\Rightarrow\sigma=80\)L21
② 新分布标准化区间\(P=P[\frac{370-550}{100}<Z<\frac{730-550}{100}]\)L21
③ 查表作差\(P[-1.8<Z<1.8]=0.9641-0.0359=0.9282\)L21
433线性组合与CLT ≒ Q431L21
An insurance company sells flood and fire insurance. This year, the company's profit from selling flood insurance is normally distributed, and its profit from selling fire insurance is normally distributed with three times the mean and three times the standard deviation as from flood insurance. The profits from the two types of insurance are independent. The probability that the company earns a positive profit from selling flood insurance this year is 0.67. Calculate the probability that the insurance company earns an overall positive profit this year.
某保险公司销售洪水险和火灾险。今年,该公司销售洪水险的利润服从正态分布,其销售火灾险的利润也服从正态分布,且其均值为洪水险利润均值的三倍、标准差为洪水险利润标准差的三倍。两类保险的利润相互独立。该公司今年销售洪水险实现正利润的概率为 0.67。计算该保险公司今年实现整体正利润的概率。
(A) 0.71(B) 0.73(C) 0.81(D) 0.92(E) 0.96
两险正态和为正
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① X盈利概率得μσ关系\(\frac{0-\mu}{\sigma}=-0.44\Rightarrow\mu=0.44\sigma\)L21
② 独立和的均值与标差\(E[S]=4\mu,\ \sigma_S=\sqrt{\sigma^2+9\sigma^2}=\sqrt{10}\sigma\)L08
③ 标准化求总盈利概率\(P[S>0]=P[Z>\frac{-4(0.44\sigma)}{\sqrt{10}\sigma}=-0.56]=0.71\)L21
434命名分布 ≒ Q613L19
An amusement park has two roller coasters. This year, the numbers of accidents occurring on the first and second roller coasters are Poisson distributed with means \( \lambda_1 = 0.5 \) and \( \lambda_2 \), respectively. The probability that at least one accident occurs on the second roller coaster is twice the probability for the first roller coaster. Calculate \( \lambda_2 \).
某游乐园有两台过山车。今年,第一台和第二台过山车上发生的事故次数服从泊松分布,均值分别为 \( \lambda_1 = 0.5 \) 和 \( \lambda_2 \)。第二台过山车上至少发生一起事故的概率是第一台的两倍。计算 \( \lambda_2 \)。
(A) 1.00(B) 1.19(C) 1.23(D) 1.55(E) 2.00
泊松λ2反解
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 至少一次=1减零概率\(P=1-e^{-\lambda_j}\)L19
② 按倍数关系列方程\(1-e^{-\lambda_2}=2(1-e^{-0.5})\)∫ 微积分
③ 取对数解λ₂\(\lambda_2=-\ln(2e^{-0.5}-1)=1.546\)∫ 微积分
435命名分布 ≒ Q440L20 · L09
A large city police department is conducting an analysis of the annual number of car accidents in the city. The department hires an actuary who models the annual number of car accidents using an exponential distribution with a variance of 7225. Calculate the median minus the mean of this distribution.
某大城市警察局正在对该市年度汽车事故数量进行分析。该局聘请了一名精算师,用方差为 7225 的指数分布来对年度汽车事故数量建模。计算该分布的中位数减去均值。
(A) -2217(B) -26(C) 0(D) 26(E) 2217
指数中位减均值
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 标差=均值定参数\(\sigma=\mu=85\)L20
② 中位数方程\(e^{-M/85}=0.5\Rightarrow M=85\ln 2=58.92\)L09
③ 作差\(58.92-85=-26.08\)∫ 微积分
436命名分布 ≒ Q267L20
An insurance policy has been purchased for a windmill farm. The policy will pay to compensate for the loss of revenue resulting from certain weather hazards that shut down the farm. Each such loss is exponentially distributed with standard deviation 1000. Calculate the probability that a random loss exceeds 1500 given that it exceeds the mean.
某风力发电场购买了一份保险保单。该保单将赔付因某些气象灾害导致农场停工而造成的收入损失。每笔此类损失服从标准差为 1000 的指数分布。已知某笔随机损失超过均值,计算它超过 1500 的概率。
(A) 0.22(B) 0.39(C) 0.50(D) 0.61(E) 0.78
指数无记忆超阈
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 标差=均值=1000\(\mu=\sigma=1000\)L20
② 无记忆性化简条件\(P[X>1500\mid X>1000]=P[X>500]\)L20
③ 生存函数求值\(e^{-500/1000}=e^{-0.5}=0.6065\)L20
437单变量基础 ⭐ 主推L01
Data from a study shows the following about the number of injuries a football player experiences in a year: i) The probability is 0.250 that the player experiences 1 or 2 injuries. ii) The probability is 0.036 that the player experiences 2 or 3 injuries. iii) The probability is 0.260 that the player experiences at least 1 injury. iv) The probability is 0.002 that the player experiences at least 4 injuries. Calculate the probability that the football player experiences exactly 2 injuries this year.
一项研究的数据显示,某足球运动员一年内受伤次数的情况如下:i) 该运动员受伤 1 次或 2 次的概率为 0.250。ii) 该运动员受伤 2 次或 3 次的概率为 0.036。iii) 该运动员至少受伤 1 次的概率为 0.260。iv) 该运动员至少受伤 4 次的概率为 0.002。计算该足球运动员今年恰好受伤 2 次的概率。
(A) 0.009(B) 0.014(C) 0.024(D) 0.028(E) 0.048
事件拼接求恰2
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 恰2次拆成事件加减\(P[=2]=P[1\cup2]+P[2\cup3]-P[\ge1]+P[\ge4]\)L01
② 代入数值\(=0.25+0.036-0.26+0.002=0.028\)∫ 微积分
438组合计数 💎 唯一L02
A delivery truck, when filled to capacity, can carry only three items of Type A in addition to only two items of Type B. One day, six items of Type A and four items of Type B await delivery. The ten items are brought to the loading dock one at a time in random order. Calculate the probability that the first five items brought to the loading dock will fill the delivery truck to capacity.
一辆送货卡车在装满时,除了只能装两件 B 型物品外,还只能装三件 A 型物品。某天,有六件 A 型物品和四件 B 型物品等待送货。这十件物品以随机顺序被逐一送到装货台。计算送到装货台的前五件物品将把送货卡车装至满载的概率。
(A) 1/210(B) 1/21(C) 1/10(D) 21/100(E) 10/21
前五件装满概率
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 装满⇔前5件取3A2B事件等价转化L01
② 超几何概率\(\frac{\binom{6}{3}\binom{4}{2}}{\binom{10}{5}}\)L02
③ 化简\(=\frac{20\cdot6}{252}=\frac{10}{21}\)∫ 微积分
439线性组合与CLT ≒ Q431L21
An insurance company's profit for one year is normally distributed with probability 0.8531 of being positive. The company's profit the next year is normally distributed with probability 0.9192 of being positive. The yearly profits are independent with the same mean but different standard deviations. Calculate the probability that the insurance company earns an overall positive profit in this two-year period.
某保险公司某一年的利润服从正态分布,为正的概率为 0.8531。该公司下一年的利润服从正态分布,为正的概率为 0.9192。各年利润相互独立,均值相同但标准差不同。计算该保险公司在这两年期间实现整体正利润的概率。
(A) 0.7842(B) 0.7995(C) 0.8849(D) 0.9535(E) 0.9929
两年正态和为正
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 两年各自标准化\(\sigma_X=\mu/1.05,\ \sigma_Y=\mu/1.40\)L21
② 独立和的参数\(E[S]=2\mu,\ \sigma_S=\mu\sqrt{1/1.05^2+1/1.40^2}=1.1905\mu\)L08
③ 标准化两年总盈利\(P[S>0]=P[Z>-1.68]=0.9535\)L21
440命名分布 📌 L20 ⭐ 主推L20 · L09
Losses under a boat insurance policy are exponentially distributed. The median loss is 400. Calculate the mean loss.
某船舶保险保单下的损失服从指数分布。损失的中位数为 400。计算损失的均值。
(A) 400(B) 446(C) 492(D) 533(E) 577
指数中位反推均值
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 写指数CDF\(F(x)=1-e^{-x/\lambda}\)L20
② 中位数400列方程\(1-e^{-400/\lambda}=0.5\)L09
③ 取对数解λ\(\lambda=400/\ln 2=577.08\)∫ 微积分
441命名分布 ⭐ 主推L15 · L08
A patient must undergo hospitalization and surgery. The hospitalization and surgery charges are uniformly distributed on the intervals \( [0, b] \) and \( [0, 2b-6] \), respectively, where \( b \) is a constant larger than 3. The standard deviation of the hospitalization charge is 9.60. Calculate the standard deviation of the surgery charge.
一名患者必须接受住院和手术。住院费用和手术费用分别在区间 \( [0, b] \) 和 \( [0, 2b-6] \) 上均匀分布,其中 \( b \) 是一个大于 3 的常数。住院费用的标准差为 9.60。计算手术费用的标准差。
(A) 13.2(B) 15.7(C) 17.5(D) 19.2(E) 19.9
双均匀标差关系
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均匀标差公式反解b\(b/\sqrt{12}=9.6\Rightarrow b=33.255\)L15
② 手术费区间长代入\(\frac{2b-6}{\sqrt{12}}=\frac{2(33.255)-6}{\sqrt{12}}=17.4677\)L15
442命名分布 📌 L15 ⭐ 主推L15 · L08
Let X be a random variable that is uniform on \( [a, b] \). The probability that X is greater than 8 is 0.60. The probability that X is greater than 11 is 0.20. Calculate the variance of X.
设 X 为在 \( [a, b] \) 上服从均匀分布的随机变量。X 大于 8 的概率为 0.60,X 大于 11 的概率为 0.20。计算 X 的方差。
(A) 3.70(B) 4.69(C) 6.25(D) 7.24(E) 8.75
均匀反解区间方差
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 两条尾概率列方程\(0.2=\frac{b-11}{b-a},\ 0.6=\frac{b-8}{b-a}\)L15
② 联立解端点\(3b-33=b-8\Rightarrow b=12.5,\ a=5\)∫ 微积分
③ 均匀方差公式\(Var=\frac{(12.5-5)^2}{12}=4.6875\)L15
443数字特征 💎 唯一L07
A continuous random variable, X, has density function \( f(x) \) where \( f(x) = \frac{x-1}{4} \) for \( 1 < x < 3 \), \( f(x) = \frac{5-x}{4} \) for \( 3 \le x < 5 \), and \( f(x) = 0 \) otherwise. Determine which of the following expressions equals \( \mathrm{E}(|X-2|) \).
一个连续随机变量 X 具有密度函数 \( f(x) \),其中当 \( 1 < x < 3 \) 时 \( f(x) = \frac{x-1}{4} \),当 \( 3 \le x < 5 \) 时 \( f(x) = \frac{5-x}{4} \),其余情形 \( f(x) = 0 \)。判断下列表达式中哪一个等于 \( \mathrm{E}(|X-2|) \)。
(A) \( \frac{1}{4}\int_1^2 (2-x)(x-1)\,dx + \frac{1}{4}\int_2^3 (x-2)(x-1)\,dx + \frac{1}{4}\int_3^5 (2-x)(5-x)\,dx \)(B) \( \frac{1}{4}\int_1^3 (2-x)(x-1)\,dx + \frac{1}{4}\int_3^5 (x-2)(5-x)\,dx \)(C) \( \frac{1}{4}\int_1^2 (x-2)(x-1)\,dx + \frac{1}{4}\int_2^3 (2-x)(x-1)\,dx + \frac{1}{4}\int_3^5 (2-x)(5-x)\,dx \)(D) \( \frac{1}{4}\int_1^3 (x-2)(x-1)\,dx + \frac{1}{4}\int_3^5 (x-2)(5-x)\,dx \)(E) \( \frac{1}{4}\int_1^2 (2-x)(x-1)\,dx + \frac{1}{4}\int_2^3 (x-2)(x-1)\,dx + \frac{1}{4}\int_3^5 (x-2)(5-x)\,dx \)
E|X-2|积分表达
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 绝对值期望用LOTUS\(E|X-2|=\int_1^5 |x-2|f(x)dx\)L07
② 按x=2拆符号区间\(=\int_1^2(2-x)f+\int_2^5(x-2)f\)∫ 微积分
③ 代分段密度分三段积\(f=\frac{x-1}{4}(x<3),\ \frac{5-x}{4}(x>3)\)∫ 微积分
444离散联合 ⭐ 主推L12 · L11
The joint probability function of X and Y is given by \( p(x,y) = \frac{-2x - 4y + xy + 8}{18} \) for \( x = 1, 2, 3 \) and \( y = 0, 1 \), and \( p(x,y) = 0 \) otherwise. Calculate \( \mathrm{E}\left(\frac{Y}{X}\right) \).
X 与 Y 的联合概率函数为:当 \( x = 1, 2, 3 \) 且 \( y = 0, 1 \) 时 \( p(x,y) = \frac{-2x - 4y + xy + 8}{18} \),其余情形 \( p(x,y) = 0 \)。计算 \( \mathrm{E}\left(\frac{Y}{X}\right) \)。
(A) 0.102(B) 0.200(C) 0.241(D) 0.306(E) 0.722
联合矩E(Y/X)
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 列联合pmf表6格概率,和为1(分母18)L11
② 对Y/X做联合LOTUS\(E[Y/X]=\sum\frac{y}{x}p(x,y)\)L12
③ 仅y=1三格有贡献\(\frac{3}{18}\cdot1+\frac{2}{18}\cdot\frac12+\frac{1}{18}\cdot\frac13=\frac{13}{54}\)∫ 微积分
445组合计数 ≒ Q367L01
In a study of driver safety, drivers were categorized according to three risk factors. For each risk factor, exactly 1200 drivers exhibited that risk factor, and exactly 420 among them exhibited only that risk factor. There were exactly 320 drivers who exhibited all three risk factors and 480 who exhibited none of the three risk factors. Calculate the number of drivers in the study.
在一项驾驶人安全研究中,驾驶人按三个风险因素进行分类。对于每个风险因素,恰有 1200 名驾驶人表现出该风险因素,而其中恰有 420 名仅表现出该风险因素。恰有 320 名驾驶人表现出全部三个风险因素,恰有 480 名不表现出这三个风险因素中的任何一个。计算该研究中驾驶人的数量。
(A) 1740(B) 2290(C) 2750(D) 3440(E) 4080
三风险文氏计数
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 单因子人数\(3\times420=1260\)L01
② 用第一因子1200人配平\(1200-420-320=460\Rightarrow 230\times2\)L01
③ 恰两因子合计\(3\times230=690\)L01
④ 四类相加\(1260+320+690+480=2750\)∫ 微积分
446离散联合 ≒ Q517L11 · L08
Once each morning and once each afternoon, the driver of a delivery truck is assigned to a route with a length that depends upon the items being delivered. The morning route is 5, 10, or 40 miles. The afternoon route is 0, 5, or 30 miles. The routes are assigned with the following probabilities: Length of Afternoon Route (miles): 0, 5, 30 | Length of Morning Route (miles) 5: 0, 2x, 3x | Length of Morning Route (miles) 10: 0, 2x, 0 | Length of Morning Route (miles) 40: y, 0, 0. The expected length of the assigned afternoon route is 11 miles. Calculate the variance of the length of the afternoon route.
每天上午一次、下午一次,一辆送货卡车的司机被指派一条路线,其长度取决于所配送的物品。上午的路线为 5、10 或 40 英里。下午的路线为 0、5 或 30 英里。路线按下列概率指派:下午路线长度(英里):0、5、30 | 上午路线长度(英里)5:0、2x、3x | 上午路线长度(英里)10:0、2x、0 | 上午路线长度(英里)40:y、0、0。所指派下午路线的期望长度为 11 英里。计算下午路线长度的方差。
(A) 159.0(B) 168.5(C) 181.5(D) 259.0(E) 269.0
联合表边缘方差
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均值方程解概率\(11=5(0.4)+30(3x)\Rightarrow x=0.10,\ y=0.30\)L07
② 方差按定义加权\(\sum(v-11)^2p\)L08
③ 代值求和\(121(0.3)+36(0.4)+361(0.3)=159.0\)∫ 微积分
447保险赔付 💎 唯一L15 · L07
The amount of money stolen from an insured home during a burglary is modeled by a random variable that is uniformly distributed on the interval [0, 1000]. The claim payment that the insurer makes for such a loss under its homeowners policy has the following characteristics: i) The claim payment equals a constant percentage, \( p \), of the amount by which the loss exceeds 400. ii) The expected claim payment is 90. Calculate \( p \).
某次入室盗窃中从一处投保住宅被盗走的金额用一个在区间 [0, 1000] 上均匀分布的随机变量建模。保险公司在其房主保单下就此类损失所作的索赔赔付具有以下特征:i) 该索赔赔付等于损失超过 400 部分的一个固定百分比 \( p \)。ii) 预期索赔赔付为 90。计算 \( p \)。
(A) 15%(B) 18%(C) 30%(D) 50%(E) 75%
均匀超额比例赔付
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 定义赔付函数\(Y=p(X-400)\ (X>400),\ 否则0\)L05
② 期望赔付LOTUS积分\(90=\int_{400}^{1000}p(x-400)(0.001)dx\)L07
③ 积出解p\(90=180p\Rightarrow p=0.50\)∫ 微积分
448次序统计量 💎 唯一L23 · L15
A policyholder sustains one loss covered by policy A and a second loss covered by policy B. The two losses are independent and uniformly distributed on the interval [0,10]. Each policy has a deductible of 5. Calculate the probability that the larger of the two claim payments does not exceed \( t \), for \( 0 \le t \le 5 \).
某保单持有人遭受两次损失,一次由保单 A 承保,另一次由保单 B 承保。这两次损失相互独立,且都在区间 [0,10] 上均匀分布。每份保单的免赔额均为 5。计算两次索赔支付中较大者不超过 \( t \) 的概率,其中 \( 0 \le t \le 5 \)。
(A) \( \left(\frac{t}{5}\right)^2 \)(B) \( \left(\frac{t}{10}\right)^2 \)(C) \( \frac{5+t}{10} \)(D) \( \left(\frac{5+t}{10}\right)^2 \)(E) \( 1 - \left(\frac{5-t}{10}\right)^2 \)
双赔付最大值CDF
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 最大值CDF=各自平方\(P(\max(U,V)\le t)=P(U\le t)^2\)L23
② 单笔赔付CDF平移\(P(U\le t)=P(X\le t+5)=\frac{t+5}{10}\)L15
③ 合成结果\(\left(\frac{5+t}{10}\right)^2\)∫ 微积分
449离散联合 📌 L11 ⭐ 主推L11
Two random variables X and Y are each defined on a set of positive integers and have joint probability function \( p(x,y) \). A portion of the corresponding joint cumulative distribution function \( F(x,y) \) is given in the following table: x: 3, 4, 5, 6 | y = 8: 0.53, 0.62, 0.67, 0.75 | y = 9: 0.65, 0.76, 0.84, 0.93. Calculate \( p(4,9) + p(5,9) \).
随机变量 X 和 Y 均定义在正整数集合上,联合概率函数为 \( p(x,y) \)。对应的联合累积分布函数 \( F(x,y) \) 的一部分由下表给出:x: 3, 4, 5, 6 | y = 8: 0.53, 0.62, 0.67, 0.75 | y = 9: 0.65, 0.76, 0.84, 0.93。计算 \( p(4,9) + p(5,9) \)。
(A) 0.01(B) 0.02(C) 0.03(D) 0.04(E) 0.05
联合CDF差分求pmf
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 目标化为矩形概率\(p(4,9)+p(5,9)=P(3<X\le5,8<Y\le9)\)L11
② 联合CDF矩形四角法\(F(5,9)-F(3,9)-F(5,8)+F(3,8)\)L11
③ 代值\(0.84-0.65-0.67+0.53=0.05\)∫ 微积分
🔍 追问:F ↔ p 互为逆变换——累加与差分的往返,以及为什么两格合并只剩外框四角

原理:同一信息的两种编码,互逆转换(一维 f=F'、F=∫f 的离散二维版):

方向操作公式
p → F累加(铺地毯)\( F(x,y)=\sum_{s\le x}\sum_{t\le y}p(s,t) \)
F → p差分(抠格子)单格 = 四角式(差分是累加的逆运算)

本题三步转换解码:

①「目标翻译」:两个 p 格子拼成一个矩形事件——\( \{4,5\}\times\{9\} \) 恰好 = \( (3<X\le5,\ 8<Y\le9) \)(左开右闭,正整数取值下 \( 3<X\le5 \) 就是 X∈{4,5})。并没有真的把 F 表化成整张 p 表——那样每格都要做一次四角,还会用到表里没给的 F(2,·)/F(·,7);把目标格捆成一个矩形,一次四角搞定,只用给了的值。

②「矩形 → F 四角」:嵌套差分 \( [F(5,9)-F(3,9)]-[F(5,8)-F(3,8)] \),两步各是一次"大地毯减小地毯",图解:

图例: # 地毯盖住   * 目标格   o 竖带下半   . 空   (y 轴向下还有 8,7,…,1 行,用 : 表示)

第一步(对 x 差分):大地毯减小地毯,得「竖带」

    F(5,9) 地毯       F(3,9) 地毯       竖带 = P(3<X≤5, Y≤9)
  9| # # # .        9| # . . .        9| . * * .
  8| # # # .   --   8| # . . .   ==   8| . o o .
  :| # # # .        :| # . . .        :| . o o .
   +---------        +---------        +---------
     3 4 5 6           3 4 5 6           3 4 5 6

第二步(对 y 差分):竖带砍掉 y≤8 的下半段(o)

    竖带(上一步)     竖带的 y≤8 部分   只剩目标两格
  9| . * * .        9| . . . .        9| . * * .
  8| . o o .   --   8| . o o .   ==   8| . . . .
  :| . o o .        :| . o o .        :| . . . .
   +---------        +---------        +---------
     3 4 5 6           3 4 5 6           3 4 5 6
                    =F(5,8)-F(3,8)

每一步都是一维的「上下限之差」:第一步差 x(留下 x∈{4,5} 竖带,上下仍无限延伸到 y≤9);第二步差 y(竖带里砍掉 y≤8,只剩 y=9 一层)。四角式就是把这两步展开:\( F(5,9)-F(3,9)-F(5,8)+F(3,8) \)。

③ 代值:\( 0.84-0.65-0.67+0.53=0.05 \)。

为什么两格能合并成一次四角——内部角互消(telescoping)。不信合并,逐格四角再相加:

$$p(4,9)=F(4,9)-F(3,9)-F(4,8)+F(3,8)$$$$p(5,9)=F(5,9)-\underline{F(4,9)}-F(5,8)+\underline{F(4,8)}$$

相加时 \( F(4,9) \) 与 \( F(4,8) \) 一正一负全部对消(下划线项),只剩外框四角 \( F(5,9)-F(3,9)-F(5,8)+F(3,8) \)——与合并法一字不差。相邻格子的公共内墙必然对消,任何矩形块最后都只剩最外四个角,这就是四角公式对任意大矩形成立的机制(一维望远镜求和 \( \sum[F(k)-F(k-1)]=F(b)-F(a) \) 的二维版)。

选路口诀:给 p 表→数格子(11.13);给 F 表→目标捆成矩形走四角(本题);目标格不成矩形→拆成几个矩形分别四角再加。

450线性组合与CLT 💎 唯一L19 · L08
X, Y, and Z are three mutually independent Poisson random variables with common variance \( \lambda \). Let \( U = 100X + 150Y + 200Z \). The coefficient of variation for U is 0.90. Calculate \( \lambda \).
X、Y 和 Z 是三个相互独立的泊松随机变量,具有共同的方差 \( \lambda \)。设 \( U = 100X + 150Y + 200Z \)。U 的变异系数为 0.90。计算 \( \lambda \)。
(A) 0.44(B) 0.82(C) 1.22(D) 1.50(E) 2.25
线性组合变异系数
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 线性组合期望\(E(U)=(100+150+200)\lambda=450\lambda\)L19
② 独立泊松加权方差\(Var(U)=(100^2+150^2+200^2)\lambda=72500\lambda\)L08
③ 变异系数方程解λ\(0.9=\frac{\sqrt{72500\lambda}}{450\lambda}\Rightarrow\lambda=0.442\)L08
451次序统计量 📌 L23 💎 唯一L23 · L20
A system has three mutually independent components. Each component has a lifetime that is modeled by a random variable with density function \( f(y) = e^{-(y-5)} \) for \( y > 5 \), and \( f(y) = 0 \) otherwise. The system will fail when any of the three components fail. Calculate the expected lifetime of the system.
某系统由三个相互独立的部件组成。每个部件的寿命用一个随机变量建模,其密度函数为:当 \( y > 5 \) 时 \( f(y) = e^{-(y-5)} \),否则 \( f(y) = 0 \)。任一部件失效时系统即失效。计算该系统寿命的期望值。
(A) 5.20(B) 5.33(C) 5.67(D) 6.00(E) 6.33
三指数最小值期望
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 写平移指数CDF\(F(y)=1-e^{-(y-5)}\)L20
② 最小次序统计量密度\(g_1(y)=3f(y)[1-F(y)]^2=3e^{-3(y-5)}\)L23
③ 识别为5+Exp(1/3)\(E[Y_{(1)}]=5+1/3=5.33\)L20
📖 三步的关系:备料 → 装配 → 认形
① 备料(密度→CDF):\(F(y)=\int_5^y e^{-(t-5)}dt=1-e^{-(y-5)}\)。这是「平移指数」——密度自带 \((y-5)\),变量定义从 5 起跳(分布本身带平移,不是换元)。①的目的只有一个:给②准备生存函数 \(S(y)=1-F(y)=e^{-(y-5)}\)。
② 装配(min 的密度公式):\(g_1(y)=n\,f(y)\,S(y)^{n-1}=3f(y)[1-F(y)]^2\)。公式的两种来路:(a) 生存函数法——独立三件都活过 y 连乘 \(P[\min>y]=S^3\),对 \(G_{\min}=1-S^3\) 求导链式出 \(3S^2f\);(b) 直接数——3 选 1 谁最先坏 × 它的密度 × 另两件仍活着 \(S^2\)。代入:\(3e^{-(y-5)}\cdot e^{-2(y-5)}=3e^{-3(y-5)}\)。①造 S、②用 S,与 23.1 的③④同款生产-消费。
③ 认形(免积分):\(3e^{-3(y-5)}\ (y>5)\) 正是「率 3 的指数整体右移 5」的密度 → \(Y_{(1)}=5+W,\ W\sim\)Exp(均值 \(\tfrac13\))。期望平移律 \(E(c+W)=c+E(W)\):\(E=5+\tfrac13=5.33\) (B)——不用 \(\int y\,g\,dy\) 硬积,认出分布直接抄均值。
💡 快速路(三步可以全跳):共同平移先提出来 \(\min_i(5+W_i)=5+\min_i W_i\);iid 指数的 min = 率相加(竞速原理,23.12 的 θ/n 定律):3 个率 1 → 率 3 → 均值 \(\tfrac13\);答案 \(5+\tfrac13\) 心算即得。标准三步是通用流水线(任何分布都走得通),快速路是指数专属(无记忆+率相加)。
452线性组合与CLT ≒ Q269L21 · L22
An insurance company's medical claims for individual policyholders are normally distributed with a mean of 1000 and a standard deviation of 625. The insurance company sells the medical insurance to a group of 25 individuals whose claims are mutually independent. The insurance company will lose money if the total claims for the 25 individuals exceeds 27,500. Calculate the probability that the insurance company will lose money.
某保险公司针对个人保单持有人的医疗索赔服从均值为 1000、标准差为 625 的正态分布。该保险公司将医疗保险出售给一组 25 名个人,他们的索赔相互独立。若这 25 名个人的总索赔超过 27,500,该保险公司将亏损。计算该保险公司亏损的概率。
(A) 0.07(B) 0.10(C) 0.14(D) 0.21(E) 0.44
25正态和超阈
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 群体总额近似正态\(\mu=25\times1000=25000,\ \sigma=625\sqrt{25}=3125\)L22
② 标准化亏损事件\(P[\text{Claims}>27500]=P[Z>\frac{27500-25000}{3125}]\)L21
③ 查表\(P[Z>0.80]=0.2119\)L21
453保险赔付 💎 唯一L15 · L08
Losses under a policy are uniformly distributed on the interval [0, 480]. For each loss, the claim payment is a constant percentage of the amount in excess of a deductible of 240. The insurer wants the variance of the claim payment for a single loss to equal 2000. Calculate the percentage the insurer should choose.
某保单下的损失在区间 [0, 480] 上均匀分布。对每次损失,索赔支付为超过免赔额 240 部分金额的一个固定百分比。保险公司希望单次损失的索赔支付的方差等于 2000。计算保险公司应选择的百分比。
(A) 11.1%(B) 33.3%(C) 57.7%(D) 64.5%(E) 91.3%
超额比例赔付方差
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 写混合型分布\(P(X=0)=0.5,\ f_X(x)=\frac{1}{480p}\ (0<x<240p)\)L05
② 一阶矩\(E(X)=\int_0^{240p}\frac{x}{480p}dx=60p\)L07
③ 二阶矩\(E(X^2)=\frac{(240p)^3}{1440p}=9600p^2\)L08
④ 方差方程解p\(2000=9600p^2-3600p^2\Rightarrow p=0.577\)L08
454保险赔付 📌 L15 💎 唯一L15 · L06
Losses under an insurance policy are uniformly distributed on [0, 1000]. The policy has a deductible of 400. A loss occurred for which the insurance benefit was less than 400. Calculate the probability that the benefit was more than 300.
某保险保单下的损失在 [0, 1000] 上服从均匀分布。该保单的免赔额为 400。已发生一次损失,其保险给付小于 400。计算该给付大于 300 的概率。
(A) 0.100(B) 0.125(C) 0.250(D) 0.750(E) 0.875
免赔后条件概率
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 赔付事件换回损失\(P[\text{claim}>300\mid<400]=P[\text{loss}>700\mid<800]\)L03
② 均匀分布长度比\(\frac{(800-700)/1000}{800/1000}\)L15
③ 求值\(=0.125\)∫ 微积分
455条件与贝叶斯 ⭐ 主推L04 · L19
Under a health insurance policy, 70% of the policyholders are low-risk and the other 30% are high-risk. For each low-risk policyholder, the number of hospitalizations experienced this year is Poisson-distributed with mean 0.05. For each high-risk policyholder, the number of hospitalizations experienced this year is Poisson-distributed with mean 0.30. Calculate the probability that a randomly selected policyholder is low-risk, given that the policyholder undergoes no hospitalizations this year.
在某健康保险保单下,70% 的保单持有人为低风险,其余 30% 为高风险。对每位低风险保单持有人,其今年经历的住院次数服从均值为 0.05 的泊松分布。对每位高风险保单持有人,其今年经历的住院次数服从均值为 0.30 的泊松分布。计算在某位随机选取的保单持有人今年未发生住院的条件下,该保单持有人为低风险的概率。
(A) 0.280(B) 0.666(C) 0.700(D) 0.750(E) 0.760
泊松类别贝叶斯
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 设先验\(P[L]=0.7,\ P[H]=0.3\)L04
② 泊松零概率作似然\(P[N|L]=e^{-0.05},\ P[N|H]=e^{-0.3}\)L19
③ 贝叶斯反转\(P[L|N]=\frac{0.7e^{-0.05}}{0.7e^{-0.05}+0.3e^{-0.3}}=0.7498\)L04
456组合计数 ≒ Q128L02
In a group of ten patients, three have high blood pressure, six have normal blood pressure, and one has low blood pressure. Four of these ten patients are randomly selected without replacement. Calculate the probability that exactly two of these four patients have normal blood pressure.
在一组十名患者中,三名患有高血压,六名血压正常,一名患有低血压。从这十名患者中不放回地随机选取四名。计算这四名患者中恰有两名血压正常的概率。
(A) 0.058(B) 0.071(C) 0.300(D) 0.346(E) 0.429
超几何恰二
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 识别超几何抽样10人取4,6好4坏各取2L02
② 组合数计概率\(\frac{\binom{6}{2}\binom{4}{2}}{\binom{10}{4}}=\frac{15\times6}{210}=0.42857\)L02
457条件与贝叶斯 💎 唯一L03 · L19
Let X denote the number of illnesses a person experiences during a one-year period. The probability function of X is: x: 0, 1, 2, 3 | Probability: 0.28, 0.12, 0.42, 0.18. If X = 0, then the person makes no doctor visits during the one-year period. If X = k, for k = 1, 2, 3, then the number of doctor visits is Poisson distributed with mean k. Calculate the probability that the person makes at least one doctor visit during the one-year period.
设 X 表示某人在一年期间经历的疾病次数。X 的概率函数为:x:0、1、2、3 | 概率:0.28、0.12、0.42、0.18。若 X = 0,则此人在该一年期间不看医生。若 X = k(k = 1、2、3),则看医生的次数服从均值为 k 的泊松分布。计算此人在该一年期间至少看一次医生的概率。
(A) 0.18(B) 0.39(C) 0.61(D) 0.72(E) 0.89
全概率泊松混合
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 按组别全概率求零访\(P(0)=\sum_i w_i e^{-\lambda_i}\)L04
② 各组泊松零概率\(0.28+0.12e^{-1}+0.42e^{-2}+0.18e^{-3}=0.39\)L19
③ 取补\(1-0.39=0.61\)L01
458线性组合与CLT 💎 唯一L08
An investor wants to purchase a total of ten units of two assets, A and B, with annual payoffs per unit purchased of X and Y, respectively. Each asset has the same purchase price per unit. The payoffs are independent random variables with equal expected values and with Var(X) = 30 and Var(Y) = 20. Calculate the number of units of asset A the investor should purchase to minimize the variance of the total payoff.
某投资者想购买两种资产 A 和 B 共十个单位,每购买一单位的年收益分别为 X 和 Y。每种资产每单位的购买价格相同。两个收益为相互独立的随机变量,具有相等的期望,且 Var(X) = 30、Var(Y) = 20。计算该投资者应购买资产 A 的单位数,以使总收益的方差最小。
(A) 0(B) 2(C) 4(D) 5(E) 6
组合方差最小化
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 组合仓位方差(独立)\(Var=u^2(30)+(10-u)^2(20)\)L08
② 展开成二次式\(=50u^2-400u+2000\)∫ 微积分
③ 求导取最小\(100u-400=0\Rightarrow u=4\)∫ 微积分
459线性组合与CLT 📌 L22 ≒ Q67L22
For its group life policies, an insurer models the number of claims per group as independent Poisson random variables with common mean 16. The insurer randomly selects 64 of its groups. Calculate the probability that the average number of claims per group is between 15 and 18.
对于其团体人寿保单,一家保险公司将各团体的索赔次数建模为相互独立、共同均值为 16 的泊松随机变量。该保险公司随机选取 64 个团体。计算每个团体平均索赔次数介于 15 与 18 之间的概率。
(A) 0.29(B) 0.38(C) 0.95(D) 0.98(E) 1.00
64组均值CLT
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 泊松均值方差同为16\(\mu=16,\ \sigma=4\)L19
② 样本均值标差\(\sigma_{\bar X}=4/\sqrt{64}=0.5\)L22
③ CLT标准化区间\(P(15<\bar X<18)=P(-2<Z<4)=0.9772\)L21
📖 第②步思路:样本均值的 √n 定律——64 个组的平均索赔数 \(\bar X=\frac1{64}\sum X_i\),两层缩放合成:\(\mathrm{Var}(\bar X)=\frac{1}{64^2}\cdot 64\sigma^2=\frac{\sigma^2}{64}\)(先独立相加 ×64,再除以 64 的平方)⇒ \(\sigma_{\bar X}=\frac{\sigma}{\sqrt{64}}=\frac48=0.5\)。原料来自泊松:\(\sigma^2=\mu=16\Rightarrow\sigma=4\)。均值的波动按 \(\sqrt n\) 缩小——64 个组平摊,单组 ±4 的涨落被摊薄成 ±0.5。
📖 第③步思路:CLT 标准化 + 一边几乎白给——CLT:\(\bar X\approx N(16,\ 0.5^2)\)。区间两端各自 z 化:\(z_1=\frac{15-16}{0.5}=-2\),\(z_2=\frac{18-16}{0.5}=4\);\(P(-2\lt Z\lt 4)=\Phi(4)-\Phi(-2)\approx 1-0.0228=0.9772\) (D)——\(\Phi(4)\approx0.99997\),4 个 SD 外的尾巴(≈3×10⁻⁵)直接舍掉,答案就是 \(\Phi(2)\)。区间不对称是故意的:右端故意放到 4σ 外,考的就是「敢不敢把它当 1」。
为什么不做连续性校正:\(\bar X\) 的格点间距是 \(\frac1{64}\)(总数整数 ÷64),半格校正 \(\frac1{128}\approx0.008\),对 z 的影响 0.016——远小于选项间距,惯例直接舍去。对照 22.25/22.26:校正量=半个格距,格距粗(1 或 100)才值得修。
460条件与贝叶斯 📌 L06 💎 唯一L04
Claims under a product liability policy have the following characteristics: i) The number of claims does not exceed two. ii) The probability that the number of claims is exactly one is 0.08. iii) The probability that the number of claims is exactly two is 0.02. iv) For \( n = 1 \) or 2 claims, the total claim amount under the policy is a random variable X with cumulative distribution function \( F(x) = 1 - \left(\frac{500n}{x}\right) \), for \( x \ge 500n \). Calculate the probability that there is exactly one claim, given that there is at least one claim and the total claim amount under the policy is less than or equal to 2000.
某产品责任保单下的索赔具有以下特征:i) 索赔次数不超过 2。ii) 索赔次数恰为 1 的概率为 0.08。iii) 索赔次数恰为 2 的概率为 0.02。iv) 当索赔次数 \( n = 1 \) 或 2 时,该保单下的总索赔金额为随机变量 X,其累积分布函数为 \( F(x) = 1 - \left(\frac{500n}{x}\right) \)(当 \( x \ge 500n \) 时)。计算在至少有一次索赔且该保单下的总索赔金额小于或等于 2000 的条件下,恰有一次索赔的概率。
(A) 1/2(B) 3/5(C) 2/3(D) 3/4(E) 6/7
帕累托型贝叶斯
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 乘法规则算联合\(P(N=1,X\le2000)=0.08\times\frac34=0.06\)L03
② 另一支联合\(P(N=2,X\le2000)=0.02\times\frac12=0.01\)L03
③ 条件概率取比\(P(N=1\mid\cdot)=\frac{0.06}{0.07}=6/7\)L03
461命名分布 ⭐ 主推L19
The number of traffic tickets a driver receives this year is Poisson distributed. The driver's probability of receiving no tickets is \( e^{-1.5} \). Calculate the probability that the driver receives at least four tickets this year, given that the driver receives at least one ticket.
某驾驶员今年收到的交通罚单数量服从泊松分布。该驾驶员未收到任何罚单的概率为 \( e^{-1.5} \)。计算在该驾驶员今年至少收到一张罚单的条件下,其至少收到四张罚单的概率。
(A) 0.066(B) 0.084(C) 0.138(D) 0.141(E) 0.250
泊松条件至少四
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 零概率识别λ\(e^{-1.5}=e^{-\lambda}\Rightarrow\lambda=1.5\)L19
② 条件概率化尾比\(P(X\ge4\mid X\ge1)=\frac{P(X\ge4)}{P(X\ge1)}\)L03
③ 泊松pmf累加\(\frac{1-\sum_{k=0}^{3}P(k)}{1-P(0)}=\frac{0.06564}{0.77687}=0.8449\)L19
462命名分布 💎 唯一L18
Each person in a large population independently has probability \( p \) of testing positive for diabetes, \( 0 < p < 1 \). People are tested for diabetes, one person at a time, until a test is positive. Individual tests are independent. Determine the probability that \( m \) or fewer people are tested, given that \( n \) or fewer people are tested, where \( 1 \le m \le n \).
某大型人群中,每个人独立地以概率 \( p \) 检测出糖尿病阳性,其中 \( 0 < p < 1 \)。逐个对人进行糖尿病检测,直到某次检测为阳性为止。各次个体检测相互独立。求在检测人数不超过 \( n \) 的条件下,检测人数不超过 \( m \) 的概率,其中 \( 1 \le m \le n \)。
(A) \( \frac{m}{n} \)(B) \( (1-p)^{m-n} \)(C) \( 1-(1-p)^m \)(D) \( \frac{1-p^m}{1-p^n} \)(E) \( \frac{1-(1-p)^m}{1-(1-p)^n} \)
几何条件CDF比
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 识别几何分布\(P(X=k)=p(1-p)^{k-1}\)L18
② 条件概率化CDF比\(P(X\le m\mid X\le n)=\frac{P(X\le m)}{P(X\le n)}\)L03
③ 几何级数求和\(=\frac{1-(1-p)^m}{1-(1-p)^n}\)L18
463命名分布 📌 L19 💎 唯一L19
The number of brake repair jobs a particular bus needs in a year is modeled by a Poisson distribution. The probability that the bus needs at least one brake repair job this year is 0.10. Calculate the probability that the bus needs at least two brake repair jobs this year.
某辆公交车一年内需要的刹车维修次数用泊松分布建模。该车今年至少需要一次刹车维修的概率为 0.10。计算该车今年至少需要两次刹车维修的概率。
(A) 0.0052(B) 0.0100(C) 0.0500(D) 0.1054(E) 0.3303
由P≥1求P≥2
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 零概率反解λ\(0.9=e^{-\lambda}\Rightarrow\lambda=-\ln 0.9\)L19
② 至少2次取双重补\(P(X\ge2)=1-e^{-\lambda}-\lambda e^{-\lambda}\)L19
③ 代值\(=0.00518\)∫ 微积分
464命名分布 💎 唯一L15 · L09
The loss due to an injury in a certain sport is uniformly distributed on an interval. The interquartile range of a random variable is defined as the difference between its 75th and 25th percentiles. Determine the correct statement about the ratio of the standard deviation to the interquartile range of the loss due to a given injury in that sport.
某项运动中因一次受伤造成的损失在某区间上均匀分布。一个随机变量的四分位距定义为其第 75 百分位数与第 25 百分位数之差。求关于该运动中因某次受伤造成的损失的标准差与四分位距之比的正确陈述。
(A) The ratio is \( 1:\sqrt{3} \), regardless of the endpoints of the interval.(B) The ratio is 1:1, regardless of the endpoints of the interval.(C) The ratio is \( 2:\sqrt{3} \), regardless of the endpoints of the interval.(D) The ratio depends on the length of the interval.(E) The ratio depends on the location of the center of the interval.
均匀SD比IQR
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均匀标差含区间长L\(\sigma=L/\sqrt{12}\)L15
② IQR为半区间长\(IQR=0.5L\)L09
③ 取比L消去\(\frac{1/\sqrt{12}}{1/2}=\frac{1}{\sqrt3}\ \Rightarrow 1:\sqrt3\)∫ 微积分
465命名分布 💎 唯一L20
Homeowner losses due to tornado damage are exponentially distributed with standard deviation \( \sigma \). A homeowners policy covers tornado losses in full, subject to a deductible. The probability that a random loss exceeds the deductible by at least \( \sigma \) is 0.20. Calculate the probability that a random loss exceeds the deductible by at least \( 0.5\sigma \).
房主因龙卷风损坏造成的损失服从标准差为 \( \sigma \) 的指数分布。某房主保单在有免赔额的前提下全额承保龙卷风损失。一次随机损失超过免赔额至少 \( \sigma \) 的概率为 0.20。计算一次随机损失超过免赔额至少 \( 0.5\sigma \) 的概率。
(A) 0.33(B) 0.40(C) 0.46(D) 0.54(E) 0.60
指数超免赔比例
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均值=标差定分布\(F(x)=1-e^{-x/\sigma}\)L20
② 给定条件因子化\(0.20=P(L>d+\sigma)=e^{-d/\sigma}e^{-1}\)L20
③ 目标只差指数因子\(P(L>d+0.5\sigma)=e^{-d/\sigma}e^{-0.5}=0.20e^{0.5}=0.3297\)∫ 微积分
466协方差相关 💎 唯一L13
An individual buys an automobile policy and a homeowners policy for one year. The probability of an automobile claim is 0.10 and the probability of a homeowners claim is 0.05. Neither policy can have more than one claim. The correlation between the numbers of claims on these policies is 0.30. Calculate the probability that both policies will have a claim.
某个人购买了为期一年的汽车保单和房主保单。发生汽车索赔的概率为 0.10,发生房主索赔的概率为 0.05。任一保单最多只能有一次索赔。这两份保单索赔次数之间的相关系数为 0.30。计算两份保单都发生索赔的概率。
(A) 0.005(B) 0.006(C) 0.025(D) 0.033(E) 0.045
相关系数反解交集
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 识别E(XY)即目标\(E(XY)=P(X=1,Y=1)\)L12
② 伯努利标差\(\sigma_X=\sqrt{0.1(0.9)}=0.30,\ \sigma_Y=\sqrt{0.05(0.95)}=0.218\)L17
③ 相关系数公式反解\(0.30=\frac{E(XY)-(0.1)(0.05)}{(0.30)(0.218)}\Rightarrow E(XY)=0.025\)L13
467离散联合 ≒ Q444L12 · L11
Within a fleet of aircraft, planes are subject to mechanical inspection. For a randomly selected airplane, let X denote the number of inspections in the past year and Y the number of repairs. The joint probability function of X and Y is given by \( p(x,y) = \frac{x - 2y - xy + 3}{18} \) for \( x = 1, 2, 3 \) and \( y = 0, 1 \), and \( p(x,y) = 0 \) otherwise. Calculate the expected number of repairs per inspection, \( \mathrm{E}\left(\frac{Y}{X}\right) \).
在某机队中,飞机需接受机械检查。对随机选取的一架飞机,设 X 表示过去一年中的检查次数,Y 表示维修次数。X 与 Y 的联合概率函数为 \( p(x,y) = \frac{x - 2y - xy + 3}{18} \)(当 \( x = 1, 2, 3 \) 且 \( y = 0, 1 \) 时),否则 \( p(x,y) = 0 \)。计算每次检查的期望维修次数 \( \mathrm{E}\left(\frac{Y}{X}\right) \)。
(A) 3/38(B) 11/108(C) 11/36(D) 1/2(E) 11/18
联合矩E(Y/X)
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 对y/x做联合LOTUS\(E[Y/X]=\sum\frac{y}{x}p(x,y)\)L12
② y=0项归零只剩三项\(\frac{1}{18}(1+\frac12+\frac13)\)∫ 微积分
③ 通分求和\(=\frac{6+3+2}{108}=\frac{11}{108}\)∫ 微积分
468条件与贝叶斯 ≒ Q408L04
Drivers are classified as either high-risk or low-risk. Ten percent of drivers are classified as high-risk. The risk classification of each driver remains the same from this year to next year. The probability that a driver classified as high-risk is involved in an accident is 0.12 for this year and, independently, 0.12 for next year. The probability that a driver classified as low-risk is involved in an accident is 0.05 for this year and, independently, 0.05 for next year. Calculate the probability that a driver is involved in an accident next year, given that the driver is involved in an accident this year.
驾驶员被分类为高风险或低风险。10% 的驾驶员被归为高风险。每位驾驶员的风险分类从今年到明年保持不变。被归为高风险的驾驶员发生事故的概率今年为 0.12,明年独立地也为 0.12。被归为低风险的驾驶员发生事故的概率今年为 0.05,明年独立地也为 0.05。计算在某位驾驶员今年发生事故的条件下,其明年发生事故的概率。
(A) 0.004(B) 0.014(C) 0.057(D) 0.065(E) 0.099
分层事故条件概率
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 按风险类全概率展开\(P[N|T]=\frac{P[N\cap T|H]P[H]+P[N\cap T|L]P[L]}{P[T|H]P[H]+P[T|L]P[L]}\)L04
② 类内两年条件独立\(P[N\cap T|\cdot]=P[T|\cdot]^2\)L03
③ 代值\(\frac{0.12^2(0.1)+0.05^2(0.9)}{0.12(0.1)+0.05(0.9)}=0.6474\)∫ 微积分
469命名分布 ≒ Q442L15 · L09
Random variable X follows a uniform distribution with mean 12 and 75th percentile 18. Calculate Var(X).
随机变量 X 服从均值为 12、第 75 百分位数为 18 的均匀分布。计算 Var(X)。
(A) 24(B) 36(C) 48(D) 144(E) 192
均匀分位反解方差
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均值方程\(\frac{a+b}{2}=12\Rightarrow a+b=24\)L15
② 75%分位方程\(0.25a+0.75b=18\)L09
③ 联立解端点\(b=24,\ a=0\)∫ 微积分
④ 均匀方差\(Var=\frac{24^2}{12}=48\)L15
470命名分布 💎 唯一L18 · L14
The random variable X follows a distribution with probability function \( p(x) = \left(\frac{1}{5}\right)\left(\frac{4}{5}\right)^x \), for \( x = 0, 1, 2, \ldots \). Calculate \( \mathrm{Var}(X \mid X > 1) \).
随机变量 X 服从概率函数为 \( p(x) = \left(\frac{1}{5}\right)\left(\frac{4}{5}\right)^x \)(当 \( x = 0, 1, 2, \ldots \) 时)的分布。计算 \( \mathrm{Var}(X \mid X > 1) \)。
(A) 13(B) 16(C) 20(D) 22(E) 24
几何无记忆条件方差
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 几何尾概率\(P(X>1)=1-\frac15-\frac15\cdot\frac45=(4/5)^2\)L18
② 条件pmf=原pmf右移2\(\frac15(\frac45)^{x-2},\ x=2,3,\dots\)L18
③ 平移不变方差\(Var=\frac{4/5}{(1/5)^2}=20\)L08
471离散联合 📌 L12 ⭐ 主推L11 · L08
An insurance policy insures against two perils. Let X and Y be the number of monthly claims for each of these perils. The joint probability function of X and Y is given by \( p(x,y) = \frac{2x + y + 1}{36} \), for \( x = 0, 1, 2 \) and \( y = 0, 1, 2 \). Calculate the variance of the marginal distribution of X.
某保险单承保两种风险。设 X 和 Y 分别为这两种风险的每月索赔次数。X 和 Y 的联合概率函数为 \( p(x,y) = \frac{2x + y + 1}{36} \),其中 \( x = 0, 1, 2 \) 且 \( y = 0, 1, 2 \)。计算 X 的边缘分布的方差。
(A) 0.56(B) 0.64(C) 0.75(D) 0.80(E) 0.89
边缘分布方差
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 联表按列求边缘pmf\(p(0),p(1),p(2)=\frac{6}{36},\frac{12}{36},\frac{18}{36}\)L11
② 一、二阶矩\(E(X)=4/3,\ E(X^2)=7/3\)L07
③ 方差公式\(V(X)=\frac73-(\frac43)^2=\frac59=0.556\)L08
472命名分布 📌 L17 ⭐ 主推L17
Basketball team Z has a 60% chance of winning any particular game. The team plays \( n \) games this season, where \( n > 1 \), with the outcomes of these games being mutually independent. The probability that the team wins exactly three games this season is five times the probability that the team wins exactly two games this season. Calculate \( n \).
篮球队 Z 赢得任一场比赛的概率为 60%。该队本赛季共打 \( n \) 场比赛,其中 \( n > 1 \),各场比赛结果相互独立。该队本赛季恰好赢 3 场的概率是恰好赢 2 场的概率的五倍。计算 \( n \)。
(A) 6(B) 8(C) 10(D) 12(E) 14
二项概率比反解n
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 两项二项pmf成5倍比\(\binom{n}{3}(0.6)^3(0.4)^{n-3}=5\binom{n}{2}(0.6)^2(0.4)^{n-2}\)L17
② 约去公共因子\(\frac{0.6}{6}=\frac{5(0.4)}{2(n-2)}\)∫ 微积分
③ 解n\(0.1=\frac{1}{n-2}\Rightarrow n=12\)∫ 微积分
473保险赔付 ⭐ 主推L15 · L08
Losses under a boat insurance policy are uniformly distributed on the interval [0, 1]. The policy has a fixed deductible. The expected value of the claim payment on a given loss is 0.245. Calculate the variance of the claim payment on a given loss.
某船只保险保单下的损失在区间 [0, 1] 上均匀分布。该保单有一固定免赔额。某次损失的索赔支付的期望为 0.245。计算某次损失的索赔支付的方差。
(A) 0.020(B) 0.054(C) 0.062(D) 0.083(E) 0.114
均匀免赔方差
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 赔付为混合型\(Y=\max(0,X-d),\ P(Y=0)=d\)L05
② 期望方程解d\(0.245=(1-d)\frac{1-d}{2}\Rightarrow 1-d=0.7\)L15
③ 二阶矩\(E(Y^2)=\frac{(1-d)^3}{3}=\frac{0.7^3}{3}\)L08
④ 方差公式\(Var=\frac{0.7^3}{3}-\frac{0.7^4}{4}=0.0543\)L08
474线性组合与CLT ≒ Q519L20 · L08
A motorist currently has no traffic tickets. The amount of time between now and when the motorist receives the first ticket is exponentially distributed with mean 0.80 years. The motorist plans to drive more carefully after receiving the first ticket. Hence the mean time from the first ticket to the second is greater than 0.80. The amount of time between the first ticket and the second ticket is exponentially distributed and is independent of when the motorist receives the first ticket. The variance of the number of years from now until the second ticket is 2.65. Calculate the expected amount of time, in years, between the motorist's first and second traffic tickets.
某驾驶员目前没有任何交通罚单。从现在起到该驾驶员收到第一张罚单之间的时间服从均值为 0.80 年的指数分布。该驾驶员计划在收到第一张罚单后更谨慎地驾驶。因此,从第一张罚单到第二张罚单的平均时间大于 0.80。第一张罚单到第二张罚单之间的时间服从指数分布,且与该驾驶员何时收到第一张罚单相互独立。从现在起到第二张罚单之间年数的方差为 2.65。计算该驾驶员第一张与第二张交通罚单之间的期望时间(以年为单位)。
(A) 0.83(B) 0.96(C) 1.42(D) 1.85(E) 2.01
独立和方差可加
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 指数方差=均值平方\(Var(X)=0.8^2,\ Var(Y)=\mu^2\)L20
② 独立和方差可加\(2.65=Var(X+Y)=0.8^2+\mu^2\)L08
③ 开方解μ\(\mu=\sqrt{2.65-0.64}=1.418\)∫ 微积分
475数字特征 💎 唯一L07
Let X represent the number of defective parts in a shipment of four. \( P[X \ge x] = \frac{1}{4}\left(1 - \frac{x-2}{3}\right)^2 \), for x = 1, 2, 3, 4. Calculate E(X).
设 X 表示一批四件货物中的次品数。\( P[X \ge x] = \frac{1}{4}\left(1 - \frac{x-2}{3}\right)^2 \)(当 x = 1、2、3、4 时)。计算 E(X)。
(A) 0.83(B) 0.96(C) 1.39(D) 1.81(E) 1.83
生存函数求期望
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 尾概率差分得pmf\(p(x)=P(X\ge x)-P(X\ge x+1)\)L05
② 逐点加权求期望\(E(X)=\sum_{x=0}^{4}x\,p(x)\)L07
③ 代值\(=1(0.194)+2(0.139)+3(0.083)+4(0.028)=0.833\)∫ 微积分
476离散联合 📌 L14 ⭐ 主推L11 · L03
An insurer sells an annual group life and disability policy. The joint probability distribution for death and disability is: Annual Number of Deaths: 0, 1, 2, 3, 4 | Annual Number of Disabilities 0: 0.45, 0.09, 0.03, 0.01, 0.01 | Annual Number of Disabilities 1: 0.08, 0.06, 0.02, 0.01, 0.01 | Annual Number of Disabilities 2: 0.07, 0.05, 0.02, 0.01, 0.00 | Annual Number of Disabilities 3: 0.04, 0.02, 0.01, 0.01, 0.00. Calculate the probability of at least two disabilities, given no more than one death.
某保险公司销售一份年度团体寿险及伤残保单。死亡与伤残的联合概率分布为:年死亡人数:0, 1, 2, 3, 4 | 年伤残人数 0: 0.45, 0.09, 0.03, 0.01, 0.01 | 年伤残人数 1: 0.08, 0.06, 0.02, 0.01, 0.01 | 年伤残人数 2: 0.07, 0.05, 0.02, 0.01, 0.00 | 年伤残人数 3: 0.04, 0.02, 0.01, 0.01, 0.00。计算在死亡人数不超过一人的条件下,至少有两人伤残的概率。
(A) 0.14(B) 0.17(C) 0.18(D) 0.21(E) 0.32
联合表条件概率
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 分母:死亡<2累加\(P[\text{Death}<2]=0.86\)L01
② 分子:交事件累加\(P[\text{Death}<2,\text{Dis}\ge2]=0.18\)L11
③ 条件比值\(0.18/0.86=0.2093\)L03
477单变量基础 ≒ Q426L06 · L05
The time, in years, until replacement for a new telephone pole has probability density function \( f(t) = kt \) for \( 0 < t < 20 \), and \( f(t) = 0 \) otherwise, where \( k \) is a constant. Calculate the probability that a new telephone pole will be replaced within ten years given that it is not replaced within five years.
一根新电线杆直到更换所经历的时间(以年为单位)具有概率密度函数 \( f(t) = kt \)(当 \( 0 < t < 20 \) 时),否则 \( f(t) = 0 \),其中 \( k \) 为常数。计算在一根新电线杆未在五年内被更换的条件下,其在十年内被更换的概率。
(A) 0.19(B) 0.20(C) 0.25(D) 0.33(E) 0.94
线性密度条件概率
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 条件概率化积分比\(P[T\le10\mid T\ge5]=\frac{\int_5^{10}kt\,dt}{\int_5^{20}kt\,dt}\)L03
② k约去代限\(=\frac{t^2|_5^{10}}{t^2|_5^{20}}=\frac{75}{375}\)∫ 微积分
③ 求值\(=0.20\)∫ 微积分
478线性组合与CLT ≒ Q270L08
A company provides health insurance to employees located at four different plants. Health insurance costs at each plant are independent of those costs at any other plant. Plant managers have calculated the following statistics: Plant, Average Cost, Standard Deviation | 1, 2, 1 | 2, 2, 2 | 3, 5, 3 | 4, 7, 4. Calculate the standard deviation of the total company health insurance costs.
某公司为分布在四个不同厂区的员工提供健康保险。各厂区的健康保险成本相互独立。各厂区经理已计算出以下统计量:厂区、平均成本、标准差 | 1、2、1 | 2、2、2 | 3、5、3 | 4、7、4。计算公司健康保险总成本的标准差。
(A) 2.5(B) 5.5(C) 7.5(D) 10.0(E) 12.5
独立和标准差
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 独立和方差可加\(Var=1^2+2^2+3^2+4^2=30\)L08
② 开方得标差\(\sqrt{30}=5.4772\)L08
479命名分布 ≒ Q441L15 · L08
A patient must undergo hospitalization and surgery. The hospitalization and surgery charges are modeled by random variables uniformly distributed on the intervals \( [0, c] \) and \( [0, 3c-18] \), respectively, where \( c \) is a constant larger than 6. The standard deviation of the hospitalization charge is \( 4\sqrt{3} \). Calculate the standard deviation of the surgery charge.
某患者必须接受住院和手术。住院费用和手术费用分别由在区间 \( [0, c] \) 和 \( [0, 3c-18] \) 上均匀分布的随机变量刻画,其中 \( c \) 为大于 6 的常数。住院费用的标准差为 \( 4\sqrt{3} \)。计算手术费用的标准差。
(A) 2.8(B) 7.3(C) 10.4(D) 15.6(E) 20.8
双均匀标差关系
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均匀标差反解c\(\frac{c}{\sqrt{12}}=4\sqrt3\Rightarrow c=24\)L15
② 手术费区间长代入\(\frac{3c-18}{\sqrt{12}}=\frac{54}{\sqrt{12}}=15.5885\)L15
480线性组合与CLT 💎 唯一L08
In a group of 144 car insurance policyholders, each policyholder has no accidents this year with probability 0.80, one accident with probability 0.16, and two accidents with probability 0.04. The numbers of accidents this year for different policyholders are mutually independent. Calculate the variance of the total number of accidents this year for this group of policyholders.
在一组 144 名车险保单持有人中,每位保单持有人今年无事故的概率为 0.80,一次事故的概率为 0.16,两次事故的概率为 0.04。不同保单持有人今年的事故次数相互独立。计算这组保单持有人今年事故总数的方差。
(A) 3.15(B) 34.56(C) 37.79(D) 46.08(E) 54.37
144独立和方差
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 单人一二阶矩\(E(X)=0.24,\ E(X^2)=0.32\)L07
② 单人方差\(0.32-0.24^2=0.2624\)L08
③ 独立求和乘144\(144\times0.2624=37.7856\)L08
481数字特征 📌 L15 💎 唯一L07 · L08
The number of days required for a damage control team to locate and repair a leak in the hull of a ship is modeled by a discrete random variable, N. N is uniformly distributed on {1, 2, 3, 4, 5}. The cost of locating and repairing a leak is \( N^2 + N + 1 \). Calculate the expected cost of locating and repairing a leak in the hull of the ship.
损管小组定位并修复船体某处泄漏所需的天数用离散随机变量 N 建模,N 在 {1, 2, 3, 4, 5} 上服从均匀分布。定位并修复一处泄漏的成本为 \( N^2 + N + 1 \)。计算定位并修复船体泄漏的期望成本。
(A) 11(B) 12(C) 13(D) 14(E) 15
离散均匀函数期望
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 等概率0.2求矩\(E(N)=3,\ E(N^2)=11\)L07
② 成本用线性性拆开\(E(N^2+N+1)=E(N^2)+E(N)+1\)L07
③ 代值\(=11+3+1=15\)∫ 微积分
482命名分布 ≒ Q622L15 · L08
A flight is delayed due to bad weather. The delay time is modeled by a random variable with a continuous uniform distribution. The expected delay time is three hours, and the standard deviation of the delay time is one hour. Calculate the shortest possible delay time, in hours.
某航班因恶劣天气而延误。延误时间由服从连续均匀分布的随机变量刻画。期望延误时间为三小时,延误时间的标准差为一小时。计算可能的最短延误时间(以小时为单位)。
(A) 0.58(B) 1.27(C) 1.73(D) 2.31(E) 2.42
均匀反解端点
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均值方程\(\frac{a+b}{2}=3\Rightarrow b=6-a\)L15
② 方差方程\(\frac{(b-a)^2}{12}=1\)L15
③ 代入解a\(\frac{(6-2a)^2}{12}=1\Rightarrow a=1.26795\)∫ 微积分
483命名分布 💎 唯一L17 · L08
A doctor tests 100 patients for two diseases, A and B. Each patient has probability \( p \) of having disease A and probability \( p \) of having disease B, with \( 0 \le p \le 0.50 \). For each patient, the event of having disease A and the event of having disease B are independent. The test outcomes for different patients are mutually independent. The variance of the number of patients who have disease A is 9.00. Calculate the variance of the number of patients who have at least one of the two diseases.
某医生对 100 名患者检测两种疾病 A 和 B。每位患者患疾病 A 的概率为 \( p \),患疾病 B 的概率为 \( p \),其中 \( 0 \le p \le 0.50 \)。对每位患者,患疾病 A 的事件与患疾病 B 的事件相互独立。不同患者的检测结果相互独立。患疾病 A 的患者人数的方差为 9.00。计算至少患两种疾病之一的患者人数的方差。
(A) 15.39(B) 1600(C) 16.59(D) 17.19(E) 18.00
二项并事件方差
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 二项方差反解p\(9=100p(1-p)\Rightarrow p=0.1\)L17
② 至少一病取补(独立)\(1-0.9\times0.9=0.19\)L11
③ 新二项方差\(100(0.19)(0.81)=15.39\)L17
484命名分布 💎 唯一L15 · L09
An insurance company has customer service operations in Denver, Philadelphia, and Salt Lake City. Employee salaries in Denver are uniformly distributed from 25 to 90. Employee salaries in Philadelphia are uniformly distributed from 45 to \( x \). Employee salaries in Salt Lake City are uniformly distributed from 10 to \( x/3 \). The 40th percentile of Denver salaries is equal to the 20th percentile of Philadelphia salaries. Calculate the median of Salt Lake City employee salaries.
某保险公司在丹佛、费城和盐湖城设有客户服务业务。丹佛的员工薪资在 25 到 90 之间均匀分布。费城的员工薪资在 45 到 \( x \) 之间均匀分布。盐湖城的员工薪资在 10 到 \( x/3 \) 之间均匀分布。丹佛薪资的第 40 百分位数等于费城薪资的第 20 百分位数。计算盐湖城员工薪资的中位数。
(A) 12.5(B) 17.5(C) 25.0(D) 35.0(E) 60.0
均匀分位链求中位
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① Denver40%分位\(0.6(25)+0.4(90)=51\)L09
② Philly20%分位等式解x\(36+0.2x=51\Rightarrow x=75\)∫ 微积分
③ SLC均匀取中位数\(\frac{10+25}{2}=17.5\)L15
485命名分布 💎 唯一L15 · L09
The loss due to a warehouse robbery is modeled by a uniform distribution on the interval \( [a, 2a] \), where \( a \) is a positive constant. The ratio of the 40th percentile of the loss to the \( p \)th percentile of the loss equals the ratio of the \( p \)th percentile of the loss to the 80th percentile of the loss. Calculate \( p \).
某仓库抢劫造成的损失由区间 \( [a, 2a] \) 上的均匀分布刻画,其中 \( a \) 为正常数。损失的第 40 百分位数与损失的第 \( p \) 百分位数之比,等于损失的第 \( p \) 百分位数与损失的第 80 百分位数之比。计算 \( p \)。
(A) 56.6(B) 58.7(C) 60.0(D) 61.4(E) 65.4
均匀分位等比
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均匀分位数线性式\(q_p=(1-p)a+p(2a)=(1+p)a\)L09
② 40%与80%分位\(1.4a,\ 1.8a\)L09
③ 等比条件列方程\(\frac{1.4a}{(1+p)a}=\frac{(1+p)a}{1.8a}\)∫ 微积分
④ 解p\((1+p)^2=2.52\Rightarrow p=0.587\)∫ 微积分
486条件与贝叶斯 📌 L02 💎 唯一L03
A study of fire damage claims is conducted. Claim amounts are mutually independent and each claim amount exceeds 1000 with probability 0.20. Calculate the probability that at least one of three randomly selected claim amounts exceeds 1000.
对火灾损坏索赔进行了一项研究。各索赔金额相互独立,且每笔索赔金额超过 1000 的概率为 0.20。计算随机选取的三笔索赔金额中至少有一笔超过 1000 的概率。
(A) 0.472(B) 0.488(C) 0.512(D) 0.528(E) 0.600
独立补集至少一
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 识别二项分布\(N\sim B(3,0.2)\)L17
② 至少一次取补\(P(N>0)=1-0.8^3=0.488\)L17
487条件与贝叶斯 💎 唯一L03
A group of students will take Exam 1. Those who pass Exam 1 will take Exam 2. Those who also pass Exam 2 will take Exam 3. For the initial group, the probability of passing Exam 1 is 0.80, the probability of passing Exams 1 and 2 is 0.48, and the probability of passing Exams 1, 2, and 3 is 0.36. A student who fails an exam stops taking exams. Calculate the probability that a student of this group passes Exam 2, given that the student does not pass all three exams.
一组学生将参加考试 1。通过考试 1 的人将参加考试 2。同时通过考试 2 的人将参加考试 3。对于最初的这组学生,通过考试 1 的概率为 0.80,同时通过考试 1 和考试 2 的概率为 0.48,同时通过考试 1、2、3 的概率为 0.36。凡某场考试未通过的学生即停止参加后续考试。已知某学生未能通过全部三场考试,计算该组中这名学生通过考试 2 的概率。
(A) 0.12(B) 0.19(C) 0.25(D) 0.64(E) 0.75
串联考试条件
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 分母:未三连过取补\(1-0.36=0.64\)L01
② 分子:过2未过3作差\(0.48-0.36=0.12\)L01
③ 条件比值\(0.12/0.64=0.1875\)L03
488命名分布 📌 L18 ⭐ 主推L18
A representative of a market research firm contacts consumers by phone to conduct surveys. The specific consumer contacted by each phone call is randomly determined. The probability that a phone call produces a completed survey is 0.25. Calculate the probability that the eighth phone call produces the third completed survey.
某市场调研公司的代表通过电话联系消费者进行问卷调查。每通电话联系到的具体消费者是随机确定的。一通电话产生一份完成问卷的概率为 0.25。 计算第八通电话产生第三份完成问卷的概率。
(A) 0.03(B) 0.08(C) 0.13(D) 0.21(E) 0.31
负二项第8次第3成
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 前7次恰2次成功\(\binom{7}{2}(0.25)^2(0.75)^5=0.31146\)L17
② 第8次必成功相乘\(0.31146\times0.25=0.078\)L18
489保险赔付 ≒ Q610L15 · L07
The amount of loss under an insurance policy is uniformly distributed on [10, 60]. The insurer will reimburse the full amount of the loss up to a maximum benefit. The expected benefit per loss is equal to 31. Calculate the maximum benefit under the policy.
某保险单下的损失额在 [10, 60] 上服从均匀分布。保险公司将按损失全额进行赔付,但以某一最高赔付限额为上限。每次损失的期望给付等于 31。计算该保单下的最高赔付限额。
(A) 35(B) 38(C) 40(D) 52(E) 56
均匀封顶期望反解
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 封顶赔付期望分段积\(31=\int_{10}^{b}\frac{x}{50}dx+\int_b^{60}\frac{b}{50}dx\)L07
② 整理成二次方程\(b^2-120b+3200=0\)∫ 微积分
③ 因式分解取可行根\((b-40)(b-80)=0\Rightarrow b=40\)∫ 微积分
490条件与贝叶斯 ≒ Q418L04
A person mails four packages. Two are fragile and two are not. Each fragile package has probability 0.2 of breaking; each non-fragile package has probability 0.1 of breaking. The occurrences of packages breaking are mutually independent. Exactly two packages break. Calculate the probability that both broken packages were fragile.
某人寄出四个包裹。其中两个易碎,两个不易碎。每个易碎包裹破损的概率为 0.2;每个不易碎包裹破损的概率为 0.1。各包裹是否破损相互独立。恰好有两个包裹破损。计算破损的两个包裹都是易碎包裹的概率。
(A) 0.032(B) 0.040(C) 0.167(D) 0.336(E) 0.609
破损包裹贝叶斯
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 分母:独立卷积求和2\(P(X+Y=2)=\sum_k P(X=k)P(Y=2-k)=0.0964\)L11
② 分子:X=2且Y=0\((0.2)^2(0.9)^2=0.0324\)L11
③ 条件比值\(0.0324/0.0964=0.336\)L03
491数字特征 ≒ Q43L07 · L05
Let X be a random variable with cumulative distribution function \( F(x) = \begin{cases} 0, & x < 0 \\ \frac{1}{2}x^3, & 0 \le x < 1 \\ 2x - \frac{x^2}{2} - 1, & 1 \le x \le 2 \\ 1, & x > 2. \end{cases} \) Calculate E(X).
设 X 是一个随机变量,其累积分布函数为 \( F(x) = \begin{cases} 0, & x < 0 \\ \frac{1}{2}x^3, & 0 \le x < 1 \\ 2x - \frac{x^2}{2} - 1, & 1 \le x \le 2 \\ 1, & x > 2. \end{cases} \) 计算 E(X)。
(A) 3/8(B) 25/48(C) 2/3(D) 1(E) 25/24
分段CDF求期望
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 写分段密度\(f(x)=\frac32x^2\ (0\le x<1),\ 2-x\ (1\le x\le2)\)L05
② 期望分段积分\(E(X)=\int_0^1\frac32x^3dx+\int_1^2 x(2-x)dx\)L07
③ 求和\(=\frac38+\frac23=\frac{25}{24}\)∫ 微积分
492命名分布 ≒ Q142L20 · L05
A machine's lifetime X, in years, is modeled by an exponential distribution. The probability that the machine still functions after one year is 0.80. F is the cumulative distribution function for X. Determine F(x) for \( x \ge 0 \).
某机器的寿命 X(以年计)用指数分布建模。该机器在一年后仍能运转的概率为 0.80。F 为 X 的累积分布函数。求 \( x \ge 0 \) 时的 F(x)。
(A) \( F(x) = 0.8^x \)(B) \( F(x) = 0.8^x e^{-0.8x} \)(C) \( F(x) = 1 - 0.8^x \)(D) \( F(x) = 1 - e^{-0.8x} \)(E) \( F(x) = e^{-0.8x} \)
指数CDF形式
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 一年生存概率定参数\(0.80=P[X>1]=e^{-\lambda}\)L20
② CDF用0.8的幂表示\(F(x)=1-e^{-\lambda x}=1-0.80^x\)L05
493离散联合 📌 L11 ≒ Q476L11 · L03
An insurer sells a group life and disability policy. The joint probability distribution for death and disability is given in the table below. Number of Deaths: 0, 1, 2, 3, 4 | Number of Disabilities 0: 0.51, 0.09, 0.04, 0.01, 0.01 | Number of Disabilities 1: 0.08, 0.06, 0.02, 0.01, 0.01 | Number of Disabilities 2: 0.04, 0.03, 0.01, 0.01, 0.00 | Number of Disabilities 3: 0.03, 0.02, 0.01, 0.01, 0.00 Calculate the probability of at least two disabilities given no more than one death.
某保险公司销售一份团体寿险及伤残保单。 死亡与伤残的联合概率分布如下表所示。 死亡人数:0, 1, 2, 3, 4 | 伤残人数 0:0.51, 0.09, 0.04, 0.01, 0.01 | 伤残人数 1:0.08, 0.06, 0.02, 0.01, 0.01 | 伤残人数 2:0.04, 0.03, 0.01, 0.01, 0.00 | 伤残人数 3:0.03, 0.02, 0.01, 0.01, 0.00 计算在死亡人数不超过一人的条件下,至少有两人伤残的概率。
(A) 0.12(B) 0.14(C) 0.15(D) 0.25(E) 0.75
联合表条件概率
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 分子:交事件格累加\(0.04+0.03+0.03+0.02=0.12\)L11
② 分母:死亡≤1累加\(0.51+0.09+0.08+0.06+0.04+0.03+0.03+0.02=0.86\)L01
③ 条件比值\(0.12/0.86=0.1395\)L03
494命名分布 💎 唯一L17
Each of the twelve employees of a company independently has the same probability of being accident-free this year. The expected number of accident-free employees is 9. Calculate the variance of the number of accident-free employees this year.
某公司的十二名员工中,每人今年无事故的概率相同且相互独立。无事故员工人数的期望为 9。计算今年无事故员工人数的方差。
(A) 0.75(B) 1.50(C) 2.25(D) 9.00(E) 12.00
二项方差
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 识别二项分布建模\(X\sim\mathrm{Bin}(12,p)\)L17
② 由均值反解成功率\(9=E(X)=12p\Rightarrow p=0.75\)L17
③ 代入二项方差公式\(\mathrm{Var}(X)=np(1-p)=9(0.25)=2.25\)L17
495数字特征 ≒ Q571L08
The heights, in feet, of basketball players in a city league are modeled by a random variable, X, with probability density function \( f(x) = \begin{cases} \frac{3(x-6)^2}{2}, & \text{for } 5 < x < 7 \\ 0, & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases} \) Calculate Var(X).
某市联赛篮球运动员的身高(以英尺计)用随机变量 X 建模,其概率密度函数为 \( f(x) = \begin{cases} \frac{3(x-6)^2}{2}, & \text{for } 5 < x < 7 \\ 0, & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases} \) 计算 Var(X)。
(A) 0.33(B) 0.60(C) 2.00(D) 4.00(E) 6.00
密度求方差
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 积分求一阶矩\(E[X]=\tfrac32\int_5^7 x(x-6)^2\,dx=6\)L07
② 积分求二阶矩\(E[X^2]=\tfrac32\int_5^7 x^2(x-6)^2\,dx=36.6\)L08
③ 方差=二阶矩减均值平方\(\mathrm{Var}(X)=36.6-6^2=0.60\)L08
496保险赔付 ⭐ 主推L05 · L03
Three identical machines are purchased simultaneously and are still operating after one year. The manufacturer then buys an insurance policy that pays 1000 if any of the three machines fails during the second year of use. The three machines operate independently. The age at failure, in years, for each of these machines has cumulative distribution function \( F(x) = \begin{cases} 1 - \left(\frac{1}{x}\right)^{\frac{1}{4}}, & \text{for } x \ge 1 \\ 0, & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases} \) Note that \( x \ge 1 \) because each machine has already successfully completed one year of operation. Calculate the expected claim payment for this policy.
三台相同的机器同时购入,并在一年后仍在运转。随后制造商购买了一份保险单,若三台机器中任何一台在使用的第二年内发生故障,该保单赔付 1000。三台机器独立运行。每台机器发生故障时的年龄(以年计)的累积分布函数为 \( F(x) = \begin{cases} 1 - \left(\frac{1}{x}\right)^{\frac{1}{4}}, & \text{for } x \ge 1 \\ 0, & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases} \) 注意 \( x \ge 1 \),因为每台机器都已成功运行满一年。计算该保单的期望索赔赔付额。
(A) 4(B) 159(C) 405(D) 595(E) 996
三机独立故障赔付
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 求单台两年内失效概率\(F(2)=1-(1/2)^{1/4}=0.1591\)L05
② 独立取补求至少一台\(1-(1-0.1591)^3=0.4054\)L03
③ 乘赔付额求期望\(1000\times0.4054=405\)L07
497次序统计量 ≒ Q249L23 · L20
Let X, Y, and Z represent three independent losses with common density function \( f(x) = \begin{cases} \frac{1}{6}e^{-x/6}, & \text{for } 0 < x < \infty \\ 0, & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases} \) Let W represent the minimum of the losses. Calculate E(W).
设 X、Y、Z 表示三项相互独立的损失,具有共同的密度函数 \( f(x) = \begin{cases} \frac{1}{6}e^{-x/6}, & \text{for } 0 < x < \infty \\ 0, & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases} \) 设 W 表示这些损失中的最小值。计算 E(W)。
(A) 1/6(B) 1/3(C) 1/2(D) 2(E) 6
三指数最小值期望
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 写指数分布CDF\(F(x)=1-e^{-x/6}\)L20
② 最小值分布公式\(F_{\min}(x)=1-[1-F(x)]^3=1-e^{-x/2}\)L23
③ 识别新指数均值\(1-e^{-x/2}\Rightarrow X_{\min}\sim\mathrm{Exp},\ E=2\)L20
498条件与贝叶斯 ≒ Q19L04
In a large state, drivers are divided into three distinct age groups. The following table provides the probabilities that a one-car accident, involving a driver in a given age group, occurs in an urban, suburban or rural location in that state. Probability of accident location by age group — Driver's age, Urban, Suburban, Rural | Under 25: 7/10, 1/5, 1/10 | 25-65: 1/4, 3/5, 3/20 | Over 65: 1/20, 7/20, 3/5 Fifty-five percent of one-car accidents involve a driver who is under 25, and fifteen percent involve a driver who is over 65. A one-car accident occurs in a suburban location. Calculate the probability that the driver is under 25.
在某大州,驾驶员被分为三个不同的年龄组。下表给出了某一年龄组的驾驶员发生的单车事故在该州城市、郊区或乡村地点发生的概率。按年龄组划分的事故地点概率——驾驶员年龄、城市、郊区、乡村 | 25 岁以下:7/10、1/5、1/10 | 25-65 岁:1/4、3/5、3/20 | 65 岁以上:1/20、7/20、3/5。单车事故中有百分之五十五涉及 25 岁以下的驾驶员,有百分之十五涉及 65 岁以上的驾驶员。一起单车事故发生在郊区地点。计算该驾驶员为 25 岁以下的概率。
(A) 0.11(B) 0.17(C) 0.32(D) 0.55(E) 0.76
年龄组贝叶斯
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 全概率求郊区总概率\(P(S)=0.55(\tfrac15)+0.30(\tfrac35)+0.15(\tfrac7{20})=0.3425\)L04
② 求联合概率\(P(S\cap U)=0.55(\tfrac15)=0.11\)L03
③ 条件概率取比值\(P(U\mid S)=0.11/0.3425=0.3212\)L03
499命名分布 ≒ Q461L19
An insurance agent sells life insurance policies. The number of life insurance policies sold in a month can be modeled by a Poisson distribution with mean 4. The agent sold at least one life insurance policy in a particular month. Calculate the probability that the agent sold more than three life insurance policies in that month.
某保险代理人销售人寿保险单。一个月内售出的人寿保险单数量可用均值为 4 的泊松分布建模。该代理人在某一特定月份至少售出了一份人寿保险单。计算该代理人在该月售出多于三份人寿保险单的概率。
(A) 0.567(B) 0.577(C) 0.624(D) 0.776(E) 0.839
泊松条件超三
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 泊松求分子尾概率\(P(X>3)=1-e^{-4}\sum_{k=0}^{3}\tfrac{4^k}{k!}=0.5665\)L19
② 泊松求分母\(P(X\ge1)=1-e^{-4}=0.9817\)L19
③ 条件概率取比值\(P(X>3\mid X\ge1)=0.5665/0.9817=0.5771\)L03
500命名分布 💎 唯一L17
Whether a football player is injury-free in any one season is independent of whether the player is injury-free in any other seasons. The player's probability of being injury-free for a season is the same for each season. Let x represent the player's probability of being injury-free for exactly one of the next two seasons. Determine the player's probability of being injury-free for exactly two of the next four seasons.
某橄榄球运动员在任一赛季是否无伤,与其在任何其他赛季是否无伤相互独立。该运动员在每个赛季无伤的概率都相同。设 x 表示该运动员在接下来两个赛季中恰好有一个赛季无伤的概率。求该运动员在接下来四个赛季中恰好有两个赛季无伤的概率。
(A) \( 0.5x \)(B) \( 2x \)(C) \( x^2 \)(D) \( 1.5x^2 \)(E) \( 3x^2 \)
二项恰k用x表示
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 已知量写成二项概率\(x=\binom21 p(1-p)=2p(1-p)\)L17
② 目标写成二项概率\(\binom42 p^2(1-p)^2=6p^2(1-p)^2\)L17
③ 配方代换成x\(6p^2(1-p)^2=1.5[2p(1-p)]^2=1.5x^2\)∫ 微积分
501组合计数 ⭐ 主推L02
Each of ten homeowners independently has the same probability of experiencing at least one loss this year. Eight of these ten homeowners are insured. Three of the ten homeowners experience at least one loss. Calculate the probability that at least two of these three homeowners are insured.
十位房主中,每人今年至少发生一次损失的概率相同且相互独立。这十位房主中有八位投了保。这十位房主中有三位至少发生了一次损失。计算这三位房主中至少有两位投了保的概率。
(A) 0.384(B) 0.467(C) 0.700(D) 0.896(E) 0.933
超几何至少二
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 识别超几何抽样\(P(k)=\binom8k\binom2{3-k}/\binom{10}3\)L02
② 至少两人来自参保组\(\frac{\binom82\binom21+\binom83\binom20}{\binom{10}3}\)L02
③ 代值求和\(\tfrac{56}{120}+\tfrac{56}{120}=0.9333\)∫ 微积分
502命名分布 ≒ Q28L20
A medical insurance policyholder just experienced a hospitalization, resulting in an undetermined financial loss that is exponentially distributed. The policyholder has Plan A, which reimburses the first two units for each hospitalization. The policyholder could have chosen Plan B, which reimburses the first ten units for each hospitalization. The probability that this hospitalization is completely covered under Plan A is 0.15. Calculate the probability that this hospitalization would have been completely covered had the policyholder chosen Plan B.
某医疗保险保单持有人刚经历了一次住院,导致一笔待定的经济损失,该损失服从指数分布。该保单持有人持有 A 计划,该计划对每次住院赔付前两个单位。该保单持有人本可以选择 B 计划,该计划对每次住院赔付前十个单位。此次住院在 A 计划下被完全覆盖的概率为 0.15。计算若该保单持有人当初选择了 B 计划,此次住院将被完全覆盖的概率。
(A) 0.200(B) 0.351(C) 0.443(D) 0.556(E) 0.750
指数保额覆盖概率
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 指数CDF建方程\(0.15=P(X\le2)=1-e^{-2\lambda}\)L20
② 解出底数\(e^{-2\lambda}=0.85\)∫ 微积分
③ 幂关系求十年概率\(P(X\le10)=1-(e^{-2\lambda})^5=1-0.85^5=0.55629\)L20
503命名分布 💎 唯一L18
A trapeze artist has a constant probability, less than 0.5, of having an accident in any particular performance. The occurrence of an accident in any one performance is independent of the occurrence of an accident in all other performances. The probability that the artist's first accident occurs in the second performance is 0.16. Calculate the probability that the artist's first accident occurs in the fourth performance.
某空中飞人在任一特定演出中发生事故的概率为常数,且小于 0.5。任一场演出中发生事故与其他所有演出中发生事故相互独立。该演员首次事故发生在第二场演出的概率为 0.16。计算该演员首次事故发生在第四场演出的概率。
(A) 0.0064(B) 0.0256(C) 0.0800(D) 0.1024(E) 0.2000
几何反解p第四次
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 识别几何分布\(P(X=i)=p(1-p)^{i-1}\)L18
② 由已知解成功率\(0.16=p(1-p)\Rightarrow p=0.2\ (p<0.5)\)L18
③ 代入求目标概率\(P(X=4)=0.2(0.8)^3=0.1024\)L18
504保险赔付 📌 L09 💎 唯一L15 · L09
A construction worker experiences a back injury resulting in a loss on an insurance policy. Losses under the policy are uniformly distributed on the interval [2, 10]. The insurer reimburses the worker for 60% of this loss. Calculate the 30th percentile of the construction worker's unreimbursed loss from the back injury.
一名建筑工人背部受伤,在一份保险单下造成一笔损失。该保单下的损失在区间 [2, 10] 上服从均匀分布。保险公司报销该损失的 60%。 计算该建筑工人因背部受伤所承担的未获报销损失的第 30 百分位数。
(A) 1.76(B) 1.80(C) 2.64(D) 3.04(E) 4.40
未赔部分分位数
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 事件换元回X\(P(0.4X\le p)=P(X\le2.5p)\)L05
② 均匀CDF建方程\(0.3=\frac{2.5p-2}{10-2}\)L15
③ 解方程\(p=\frac{16(11)}{5(20)}=1.76\)∫ 微积分
🔍 追问:逐步展开——0.4X 哪来、2.5 哪来、以及「单调变换直接搬分位」捷径

① 场景翻译:保险报销 60% → 自己扛 40%,未获报销损失 \( Y=0.4X \)(比例共保,连拐点都没有,比 min/max 温和)。

② 分位数方程 + 事件换元:求 \( F_Y(\pi)=0.3 \),把 Y 的事件翻回 X 的事件——两边除以 0.4(正数,不等号方向不变;\( 1/0.4=2.5 \) 即步骤①的 2.5):

$$P(0.4X\le\pi)=P(X\le 2.5\pi)$$

③ 均匀 CDF 是线性插值:\( F_X(t)=\frac{t-2}{10-2} \)(位置在区间里走了几成),代入:

$$0.3=\frac{2.5\pi-2}{8}\;\Rightarrow\;2.5\pi=2+2.4=4.4\;\Rightarrow\;\pi=1.76$$

④ 捷径(本题题眼):严格递增变换直接搬分位——排序不变,第 30 位还是第 30 位:\( \pi_{0.3}(Y)=0.4\,\pi_{0.3}(X) \)。先求 X 的 30 分位:\( 2+0.3\times8=4.4 \),再乘 0.4 得 1.76 ✓ 两步口算。

边界:仅单调递增变换可直搬;递减变换(如 \( Y=-X \)、\( Y=1/X \))分位要翻面 \( p\to 1-p \);非单调(如 \( X^2 \) 跨零)不能搬,老实走 ②③。

505命名分布 ≒ Q158L19
At a certain intersection, the number of accidents that occur per day is modeled by a Poisson distribution with mean 0.20. The numbers of accidents that occur on different days are all mutually independent. Calculate the probability that exactly three accidents occur at the intersection in the next seven days.
在某交叉路口,每天发生的事故数量用均值为 0.20 的泊松分布建模。不同日子发生的事故数量彼此相互独立。计算未来七天内该交叉路口恰好发生三起事故的概率。
(A) 0.025(B) 0.087(C) 0.113(D) 0.191(E) 0.224
泊松七日恰三
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 泊松参数按时长可加\(\lambda_{7天}=7\times0.2=1.4\)L19
② 写泊松pmf\(P(X=3)=\frac{e^{-1.4}(1.4)^3}{3!}\)L19
③ 计算\(=0.1128\)∫ 微积分
506条件与贝叶斯 ≒ Q186L04
A college office has two student assistants, Bob and Ann, who work on alternate days. Each day, the assistant draws a morning and an afternoon assignment from a jar containing four assignments, one outdoor and three indoor. Bob always makes his selection with replacement, while Ann makes hers without replacement. On a particular day, one outdoor and one indoor assignment are selected. Calculate the probability that Bob made the selections.
某大学办公室有两名学生助理 Bob 和 Ann,他们轮流隔天工作。每天,值班助理从一个装有四项任务的罐子中抽取上午和下午两项任务,四项任务中一项为室外任务、三项为室内任务。Bob 总是有放回地进行抽取,而 Ann 则无放回地进行抽取。在某一天,抽到了一项室外任务和一项室内任务。计算是 Bob 进行抽取的概率。
(A) 3/16(B) 3/8(C) 3/7(D) 7/16(E) 1/2
有放回无放回贝叶斯
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① Bob各取一种的概率\(\tfrac34\cdot\tfrac14\cdot2=\tfrac38\)L02
② Ann各取一种的概率\(\tfrac34\cdot\tfrac13\cdot2=\tfrac12\)L02
③ 贝叶斯求后验\(\frac{3/8}{1/2+3/8}=\tfrac37\)L04
507命名分布 💎 唯一L20
The random variable X has density function \( f(x) = \begin{cases} cx^5 e^{-0.01x}, & \text{for } x > 0 \\ 0, & \text{otherwise,} \end{cases} \) where c is a constant. Calculate E(X).
随机变量 X 的密度函数为 \( f(x) = \begin{cases} cx^5 e^{-0.01x}, & \text{for } x > 0 \\ 0, & \text{otherwise,} \end{cases} \) 其中 c 为常数。计算 E(X)。
(A) 100(B) 200(C) 300(D) 500(E) 600
gamma均值无专章
